Collaborative and creative environment

Opportunity for long-term growth in a growing production team

title: Mechanical BIM Engineer
description:
Carry out daily plan take-offs for building services projects.



- Review drawings, specifications, and schedules to identify required materials, components, and system quantities.



- Prepare accurate component costing for building services scope, brackets, supports, and related assemblies where applicable.



- Develop clear and commercially accurate priced quotations based on take-offs, scope requirements, and project documentation.



- Read and interpret BIM models, 3D plans, and Revit files to verify quantities, components, layouts, and system requirements.



- Cross-check 2D drawings against BIM/Revit models to identify discrepancies, omissions, or coordination issues.



- Work closely with internal teams to clarify design intent, scope inclusions, and pricing assumptions.



- Maintain organized take-off records, costing sheets, and quotation backups for review and traceability.



- Flag errors, clashes, missing information, and constructability issues early in the pricing process.



- Ensure all take-offs and quotations are completed accurately, efficiently, and within required deadlines.

title: OPERATIONS MANAGER – TOURISM & HOSPITALITY – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

We are a fast-growing travel and expedition company based in El Nido, Palawan, operating daily tours, private expeditions, and multi-day experiences for international clients.



Our operations involve boats, drivers, guides, logistics teams, and multiple on-site partners, across El Nido, Coron, and Puerto Princesa.



We are now looking for a strong, hands-on Operations Manager to act as the founder’s right hand on the ground - someone who can supervise teams, enforce standards, detect issues early, and ensure operations run reliably every day.



This is not a remote role. This is a field-based leadership position.



OPERATIONS MANAGER – TOURISM & HOSPITALITY – PALAWAN (EL NIDO)

(Field Operations Lead / Founder’s Right Hand)



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



• Supervise daily operations across tours, logistics, and field teams (boats, drivers, guides, coordination staff)

• Be physically present on the ground to monitor execution, verify standards, and detect issues early

• Ensure all bookings, operations data, and reporting are accurate, complete, and reliable

• Identify operational dysfunctions (delays, inconsistencies, poor coordination, missing information) and resolve them quickly

• Detect and address irregularities, leakages, or potential fraud (cash handling, supplier discrepancies, internal shortcuts, etc.)

• Enforce discipline, accountability, and high standards across all teams

• Coordinate with partners and suppliers to ensure smooth and reliable service delivery

• Implement and improve processes, SOPs, and operational structure as the company grows

• Support team leaders, train staff, and ensure alignment across all locations

• Report directly to the founder and act as his eyes and ears on the ground



WHAT YOU BRING



• 5+ years experience in operations within tourism or hospitality (resorts, hotels, tour operators, transport/logistics, marine or fleet operations)

• Proven experience managing on-site teams (not remote) in real operational environments

• Strong ability to enforce rules, maintain discipline, and handle difficult situations

• Experience dealing with operational issues, staff misconduct, or fraud situations

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, imperfect, real-world environment

• Strong organizational and problem-solving skills

• Fluent in English, and comfortable working with both local teams and international clients

• Willing to be based in El Nido and travel regularly to Coron and Puerto Princesa



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role is for someone who is:



• Hands-on and field-oriented — not just behind a computer

• Detail-oriented and highly observant

• Comfortable confronting issues directly and taking decisions

• Able to manage people, not just processes

• Reliable, structured, and consistent in execution

• Looking for a long-term role with responsibility and impact



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Standards matter.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:



If you were responsible for supervising operations in a travel company, what types of dysfunctions or irregularities would you watch for?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



IMPORTANT



• This role is based in El Nido, Palawan

• This is not a remote position

• Experience in tourism, hospitality, or field operations is required

• Candidates without relevant on-site operational experience will not be considered



WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT



• Key leadership role working directly with the founder

• High level of responsibility and autonomy

• Opportunity to structure and scale real-world operations

• Dynamic, international environment in one of the most beautiful locations in the Philippines

• Strong impact on the growth and performance of the company



LOCATION



El Nido, Palawan

Regular travel to Coron and Puerto Princesa

title: Trial Reel Account Manager (Instagram Posting & Analytics) – Female Only
description:
As a Trial Reel Account Manager at SimplexMedia, you will be responsible for high-volume scheduling and posting of content on Instagram, specifically for trial reel-only clients. This role requires someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working at speed while maintaining accuracy.



You will manage mass posting (up to 8 posts per client per day) and support the team by helping track and interpret basic performance analytics.



Please note: this role is execution and analytics-focused and does not involve content strategy or content creation.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Posting & Account Management (Instagram)



Schedule and publish high-volume Instagram content (up to 8 posts per client daily)



Ensure all posts are uploaded accurately, on time, and in the correct format



Follow Instagram optimisation processes when setting up and managing accounts



Monitor trial accounts daily to ensure posting consistency and performance



Quality Assurance



Conduct daily quality checks across all assigned client accounts:



Are Instagram accounts set up correctly?



Are posts scheduled and published properly?



Are all required settings and optimisations in place?



Troubleshoot posting issues quickly and escalate when needed



Analytics Support



Track and record basic Instagram performance data for trial reel clients



Help identify trends in engagement and reel performance



Assist in compiling simple analytics reports for internal review



Administration & Communication



Keep all tasks and account updates tracked in Notion daily



Maintain clear communication with the team via Slack and



Stay on top of assigned administrative tasks and deadlines



Support other operational tasks as required by the General Manager/CEO



Further details will be provided during onboarding.



RESULTS



Accurate, consistent Instagram posting with no major errors



All trial clients receive their full daily posting volume



Performance data is properly tracked and available for review



Issues are communicated early and resolved efficiently



All tasks are documented and updated daily in Notion

title: TikTok Video Editor for VIRAL AI Health/Food Faceless Channels
description:
We're building an AI-first calorie tracking iOS app and running 3 faceless TikTok channels to drive organic installs. We're looking for one person to fully own this from zero to scale. Not just an editor. Not just a growth person. Both.



We have one internal tool that handles video generation. Everything else is on you: researching daily trends in the health and wellness niche, writing hooks, d
 content angles, selecting sounds, adding captions and text overlays, optimizing pacing, managing account warmup, scheduling posts, tracking performance, and iterating based on what the data tells you. You are the creative brain and the operator. If the numbers aren't moving, that's on you to diagnose and fix.



This is not a manual content grind. You'll work within a proven playbook with room to optimize and iterate. Minimum 2 videos per day per account at full scale across all 3 channels.



We're looking for someone who genuinely lives on TikTok, understands what performs in health and wellness right now, and has a real track record of growing accounts, not just editing videos.



Beginners will not be considered.

The pay is structured to reward performance. Base pay reaches $1,500+/month at full scale, with an uncapped bonus of $25 per video that hits 100k+ organic views. Strong performers earn well above base.



To apply, start your message with the letter X. Include: (1) a link to one TikTok account you currently manage and what results you've driven, and (2) one before/after example of raw input versus final edited video you delivered. Generic applications will not be considered.

title: CREATIVE STRATEGIST (with VIDEO EDITING BACKGROUND)
description:
We’re looking for a Creative Strategist with a strong video editing background to develop high-performing creative concepts for paid social. This role blends strategy, research, copywriting, and hands-on editing, working closely with our Growth and Creative teams to translate insights into ads that convert.



Compensation:

$1,500 – $2,500/month (depending on experience and performance)

performance-based incentives (to be discussed)



You must be able to produce performance-driven video & image ads, craft compelling angles, write clear briefs, and leverage AI tools to accelerate ideation and execution. 



A portfolio demonstrating direct-response performance wins is required.



What You’ll Do

Creative Strategy & Performance

• Develop creative concepts, angles, and hooks aligned with performance goals, customer personas, and client goals.

• Write clear, creative briefs for editors/designers (ad creative briefs, UGC briefs, production briefs, VO scripts).

• Build strategic plans outlining creative direction and testing timelines.

• Advise the Growth Strategist on winning angles and creative decisions.

• Oversee deliverables from ideation ? execution ? testing ? results.

• Analyze paid media performance and turn insights into actionable creative recommendations.

• Conduct competitive intel, social media trends research, social listening

• Adjust, iterate, or sunset concepts based on data—not ego.

• Ideally, create full-funnel experiences (ad ? landing page).



Quality Control

• Sign off on all creatives before testing, ensuring they follow performance principles, brand guidelines, and contain zero typos.



Workflow & Research

• Join client meetings alongside the Growth Strategist to present learnings and next steps.

• Conduct competitive intel, trend monitoring, and social listening.

• Deeply research customer demographics and psychographics using Reddit, FB groups, comments under ads, and organic content.

• Identify natural-language patterns, sentiment, objections, and emerging angles.



Innovation & Best Practices

• Stay up to date with top creators, performance frameworks, and industry methodologies.

• Encourage and train the team in adopting new technologies and AI tools.

• Share best practices, resources, and educational opportunities with the creative team.



Hiring & Team Contribution

• Participate in hiring editors/designers.

• Review test tasks and assist in designing them.



Technical & Tool Expertise

• Edit videos quickly and at high quality using Adobe CC (alternative tools are accepted,

please let us know what you use)

• Actively use AI and process-simplification tools (e.g., VEO 3.1, 
, ElevenLabs, Arcards, ChatGPT).

• Use research tools (Atria, Foreplay, AdSpy) to identify winning formats and angles.

• Ideally, have experience working efficiently within project management systems (Asana, ClickUp, Jira, Notion, Confluence).

• Ideally, have experience managing assets through 
, 
, and stock libraries.

• Maintain and optimize tool subscriptions for the creative team.



What You Must Bring

Hard Skills

• 1.5–2+ years as a Creative Strategist or Senior Paid Media Video Editor. Additional experience providing strategy for designers or creating static deliverables is preferable.

• Proven track record of producing high-performing direct-response ads.

• Strong copywriting for paid ads, UGC scripts, and production briefs. Ideally, experience writing copy for the funnels and/or VSLs.

• Ability to storyboard for UGC and production-level shoots.

• Video editing proficiency (Adobe CC, or other tools) and ability to deliver fast, high quality iterations.

• Hands-on experience with AI creative tools.

• Familiarity with research tools, version control tools, and project management software.



Soft Skills

• Love for social media

• Clear communication

• Storytelling & persuasion

• Data-driven thinking

• Collaboration & diplomacy

• Creativity with a performance mindset

• Strong organization & time management

• Extreme attention to detail

• Adaptability

• Proactive problem-solving

• Continuous learning & curiosity



Non-Negotiables

• Must be hands-on with editing (not only strategy).

• Must be able to produce winning ad creatives (portfolio required).

• Must demonstrate real examples of using AI tools in your workflow



To apply, fill out the application form, please do not forget to attach required portfolio.

title: Technical Recruiter - sourcing
description:

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

title: Video Editor & Food Content Assistant (Cooking + Filming)
description:
???? Taguig (near Parañaque / Bicutan)

?? Must live nearby or be able to commute easily





We’re a small, creative food content team looking for a Video Editor & Food Content Assistant to help create recipe videos for social media.



This is not a typical kitchen role.



It’s a mix of:

* video editing

* cooking

* filming

* content creation





You’ll be working closely with a small team (including one other creator), learning hands-on and helping bring recipes to life on camera.



Why this role is exciting

* Your work will be seen by an audience of 1.5+ million followers

* You’ll create content around trending recipes and food ideas

* You can take home the food you make

* All ingredients are covered

* You’ll be part of a small team where your creativity matters

* Your ideas and feedback will be valued and used in recipe development

* Flexible structure with the ability to increase your earnings based on output





What you’ll be doing

* Plan ahead and purchase ingredients for assigned recipes (costs covered)

* Prepare and cook recipes by following instructions precisely

* Film the cooking process using your phone (capturing key steps and angles)

* Set up shots, angles, and sequences to match the required style

* Plate and finish dishes with a clean, visually appealing presentation

* Review footage and refilm if needed to get the best result (quality matters more than speed)

* Edit short-form videos (Reels / TikTok style)

* Upload final footage and files to Dropbox

* Clean and reset the kitchen between recipes

* Provide feedback on recipes and suggest improvements for future versions





Requirements

* Must own an iPhone 12 Pro or newer (or equivalent with high-quality camera)

* Must have video editing experience (CapCut or similar)

* Must live near Taguig / Parañaque / Bicutan area

* Must be an experienced home cook (confident following recipes independently)

* Must have strong attention to detail and precision, especially with measurements

* Able to follow recipes closely and repeat results consistently

* Comfortable working in a kitchen environment

* Not afraid of hard work (this role can be physical and involves being on your feet)

* Takes ownership of their work and cares about producing high-quality output

* Reliable and consistent

* Comfortable working in a private home kitchen (apartment setting)





Preferred (but not required)

* Experience with baking and desserts

* Experience with pastry-style finishes (e.g. neat frosting, piping, decorating baked goods)

* Good eye for food presentation and plating

* Ability to execute clean finishes (spreading, drizzling, layering)

* Strong knife skills and clean portioning

* Interest in content creation or social media

* Familiarity with vegan or plant-based cooking (bonus)





Work Setup & Pay

* Training: hands-on, paid daily rate (3 days per week)

* You’ll be trained directly within the team

* Filming is currently done in a private home kitchen with a small team

* This role requires a high level of trust, professionalism, and respect for the space





After training:

* Flexible hours (must film during good daylight for best quality footage)

* You are responsible for managing your own output



Expected output:

* Minimum 5 videos per week

* 2–3 videos per day is achievable once trained

* No upper limit on output if quality is maintained





Pay structure:

* $11 USD per basic recipe

* $14 USD per mid-level recipe

* $17 USD per complex recipe

* Small monthly retainer

* All ingredients are covered, and you keep the food you make





Who this is for



Someone who:

* enjoys the creative process

* takes pride in doing things properly

* is patient and willing to redo things to get the best result

* is detail-oriented and precise

* wants to take ownership of their work and output

* is motivated to improve and contribute ideas





To apply



Send:

* 1–2 videos you have edited or a portfolio of your work

* A photo of a finished dish you’ve made



Include the word FOODVIDEO in your application so we know you’ve read everything.

title: Sales Representative - Wholesale Distribution (USA Working Hours)

Who We’re Looking For

How to Apply

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
HIRING: Remote Customer Service Representatives

If you're looking for a remote role where you can realistically earn $1,500–$2,000/month within your first 6 months — and you're willing to work for it — this is worth your time.

We're a growing company hiring Customer Service Representatives who communicate with clients one-on-one through text. This isn't template replies and ticket queues. You'll have real conversations — building relationships, understanding what people want, and guiding them toward the right products using emotional intelligence and genuine rapport.

Everyone knows each other by name. When you perform, leadership sees it — and you move up. We always promote from within first.

We invest heavily in our people. Before you ever talk to a client on your own, you'll shadow an experienced tea
mber. Then you go through our 4-day paid training program. By the time you start, you'll be ready.

But we expect that investment to go both ways. We're looking for someone who wants to be a high performer and plans on earning at least $1,000/month within 3 months of starting. You'll need to study training materials on your own time and give 100% of your attention during working hours. If that sounds like what you've been looking for — keep reading.



What the role involves:



Having one-on-one conversations with clients through text

Building emotional rapport and trust over time

Understanding what each client is looking for and guiding them toward the right products

Communicating with your team about client needs and insights

Using our internal tools and CRM to deliver a great client experience





Compensation:

Base hourly rate + performance-based commission. $1,500–$2,000/month is realistic within your first 6 months. The better you perform, the more you earn.



Shifts (full-time, EST / New York time):

7pm–3am | 3am–11am | 11am–7pm



What you need:



Fluent written English

40+ WPM typing speed

A computer with reliable specs

Stable internet connection

Available for full 8-hour shifts

Not currently employed full-time

Growth mindset — you want to get better, not just get by

Strong written communication and emotional intelligence

Patience and ability to take direct, constructive feedback



Helpful but not required:



Sales or customer service experience

Experience working remotely





What happens after you apply:



We review your application (we check daily)

Qualified candidates move to the next round

You'll shadow an experienced tea
mber before starting

4-day paid training program

Start working — with ongoing support from leadership



After your first month, we review performance with the leadership team. Official tea
mbers earn bonuses, extra hours, vacation pay, and access to promotion opportunities.

title: Email Lifecycle Copywriter
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights to non-technical teammates

- Organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: &quot
 Lifecycle Copywriter – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?

title: Digital Coordinator
description:
Experience Digital Coordinator 

$7/hour (AEDT)



We’re looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Digital Coordinator to help manage and coordinate our eCommerce and marketing operations.



This role is focused on execution support and coordination across Shopify, social media, and marketing channels. You will not be responsible for strategy, but you will help ensure everything runs smoothly and stays aligned.



If you’re organized, proactive, and good at keeping things on track across teams, we’d love to hear from you.



What you’ll be doing:

- Work closely with the Shopify Store Manager or other platform leads, eCommerce Operations Specialist, and Marketing team to keep everything running smoothly and aligned with targets, ensuring CRO optimization is properly implemented

- Coordinate with the Social Media Manager to ensure posts are scheduled properly, content is aligned, and messages and comments are responded to on time across TikTok, YouTube,
, and Instagram

- Ensure CRO practices are consistently applied across platforms and flag any gaps or misalignment between teams

- Keep everyone aligned on campaign goals across social media and eCommerce platforms

- Ensure all updates, changes, campaign dates, and sales data are properly tracked and recorded

- Monitor day-to-day execution across teams and follow up on pending tasks to avoid delays

- Act as the central point of coordination between marketing, operations, and platform teams

- Assist in campaign launches by ensuring all assets, links, and platforms are ready and aligned

- Double-check product listings, promotions, and website updates before and during campaigns

- Help identify gaps, bottlenecks, or missed steps in execution and flag them early

- Maintain organized trackers for tasks, campaigns, and performance data

- Ensure consistency across platforms (offers, messaging, pricing, timing)

- Support basic reporting by gathering data from Shopify, marketing channels, and other platforms

- Assist in documenting processes and keeping SOPs updated



Requirements

Experience in:

Social Media Management

Shopify or similar platforms

Meta Business Suite

TikTok Ads

Google Ads

YouTube Marketing (organic)

Klaviyo or similar



Who we’re looking for:

Organized and detail-oriented

Strong coordination and follow-up skills

Able to manage multiple platforms and teams

Proactive and reliable



Do Not Apply If:

You do not have experience as a Digital Coordinator

You do not have hands-on experience with Shopify or similar platforms

You struggle with organization, follow-ups, or managing multiple tasks

You require constant supervision to complete tasks

You always need to be told what to do



This role is not for entry-level candidates.



Application Instructions

Please include the following in your cover letter:

A short introduction about your experience as a Digital Coordinator

* Follow ups with no-answers - double-dial, text, re-engage.

Apply here:

title: Executive Assistant
description:
About the role

We are a busy real estate team looking for a highly organized, communicative virtual assistant to manage client and agent communications on behalf of our lead agent. You will be the first point of contact for clients and co-op agents — handling calls,
s, and CRM follow-ups to keep our pipeline moving. This is a full-time remote position ideal for someone who is confident on the phone and takes ownership of their inbox.



Key responsibilities

- Make and receive calls to follow up with clients and co-op/buyer’s agents already in our CRM

- Manage all inbound and outbound communications through Follow Up Boss CRM

- Manage and organize the lead agent’s
 inbox — responding, flagging, and following up as needed

- Set 1–2 qualified appointments per day on behalf of the lead agent

- Ensure no lead or client falls through the cracks with consistent, timely follow-up across all channels



What we’re looking for

- Comfortable and confident making calls — phone outreach is the core of this role, not optional

- Experience managing a busy
 inbox and CRM platform — Follow Up Boss experience strongly preferred

- Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

- Strong attention to detail with the ability to manage multiple conversations simultaneously

- Real estate industry experience is a plus but not required

- Willingness to work full time Monday- Friday 9am to 6pm EST



If selected you will be working directly with Michele, the team leader of Madison Group Properties in Bergen County, New Jersey. We hope you will be the one to help her leverage and allow her to lead her team to a record breaking year. 



**How to apply — required screening task**

To be considered for this role, please complete ALL of the following as part of your application:

1. Record a short 60–90 second video introducing yourself and explaining why you’re a good fit. Please speak clearly and confidently — this helps us assess your communication style for a phone-heavy role.

2. Write a sample follow-up message as if you were reaching out on behalf of a real estate agent to a client who toured a home 3 days ago and hasn’t responded. Keep it friendly, professional, and under 5 sentences.

3. Begin your application message with the phrase “I have read the full job description” — applications that do not include this phrase will not be reviewed.
salary: Starting at $4/hr USD, open to higher...

title: Clipper (Podcast/interview watcher)
description:
Clip Finder (Philippines-based)

Remote · Part time then Full-time after a month or so. 



Simple job. You watch videos and find the best timestamps. That's it. But to do it well, you have to be genuinely deep into American TikTok and American YouTube — not kind of, not recently. For years.



What the job is:

- Watch videos we send you

- Find the most viral, engaging, or shareable moments (not just random moments)

- Submit the timestamps



No editing. No tools. Just your judgment.



**Requirements:**

- Based in the Philippines

- Available 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Standard Time

- Have been watching American TikTok and American YouTube heavily for years — not casually

- You know what makes American audiences stop scrolling because you've been consuming their content for years



Do not apply if:**

- You don't actively watch American TikTok

- You don't actively watch American YouTube creators

- You can't work 8 AM – 5 PM PST



Both platforms are required. If you haven't done both, you will be disqualified. No exceptions.



To apply, send a short message with:

- What American creators or accounts you watch regularly

- How long you've been watching American content

- Your availability

- Huge Bonus: SEND A LOOM VIDEO LINK TALKING ABOUT why you're good for the Job.

title: Virtual Property Administrator
description:
***Apply at Kananaskis Connect Careers website.



About the Client

Our client is a Canada-based property ownership and operations business with residential assets across Eastern and Western Canada. They are seeking a part-time Property Administrator to support both short-term and long-term rental operations. This is a remote role requiring strong English communication, property administration experience, and confidence working in Yardi Breeze and related systems.



Role Overview

The Property Administrator will support the day-to-day administration of a residential rental portfolio across Canada, including both short-term and long-term properties. This role includes booking and inquiry support, lease administration, rental postings, tenant communication, maintenance coordination, property tours, and general administrative assistance. The ideal candidate is organized, responsive, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple moving pieces across a remote property operation.



Key Responsibilities



Rental Administration

Support both short-term and long-term rental operations across multiple properties

Manage booking-related administrative tasks and reservation coordination

Assist with lease administration and rental documentation

Prepare and maintain rental postings across relevant platforms

Help keep property, tenant, and booking records accurate and organized



Tenant & Guest Support



Respond promptly and professionally to inquiries from tenants, guests, and prospective renters

Support requests from both long-term tenants and short-term occupants

Arrange visits, showings, and property tours as needed

Maintain a high standard of written communication and customer service



Maintenance & Property Coordination



Help coordinate maintenance requests and follow-up for property needs

Communicate with vendors, contractors, tenants, and internal contacts as required

Support the scheduling of repairs, access, and related property visits

Assist with ordering property or operational supplies when needed



Software & Operational Support



Use Yardi Breeze and other property-related software to support daily operations

Perform accurate data entry and general administrative support

Help maintain organized digital records and operational workflows

Support properties located in both Eastern and Western Canada



Mandatory Requirements



Previous experience in property administration, rental coordination, or residential property support

Experience supporting short-term and/or long-term rentals

Hands-on experience with Yardi Breeze

Strong written and spoken English

Excellent attention to detail and organizational skills

Ability to manage administrative tasks independently in a remote setting

Strong responsiveness, follow-up, and customer service skills

Reliable internet connection and professional remote work setup



Compensation & Schedule



Salary: CAD $800–$1,000 per month

Approx. PHP 35,000–43,000 per month

Part-time remote role

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM Eastern Time

Approx. Manila schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 PM to 2:00 AM PHT



Application & Interview Process



Submit your application

Application review by recruitment team

Successful applicants will receive written interview questions to be answered via video

If successful, you will be invited to a live interview with the client

Final selection and offer



Benefits



Competitive compensation based on experience

Consistent part-time remote schedule

Opportunity to support a growing Canadian rental portfolio

Independent work environment with clear responsibilities



Commitment to Diversity

We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin,

title: Virtual Assistant (Research, Email & Data Entry)
description:
Virtual Assistant (Research,
 & Data Entry) – 20 Hours/Week to Start (Australian Business Hours)



About the Role

We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to assist with research,
 tasks, and general data entry.

The role will start at 20 hours per week and will initially involve simple administrative tasks. For the right candidate who performs well and shows initiative, there is clear opportunity to grow into a full-time role in client relations, with increased responsibility and higher pay.



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company long-term, not just a short-term project.

You must be available to work during Australian business hours.



Responsibilities

Your tasks will include:

• Online research and compiling information into spreadsheets or simple reports

•
-related tasks and written communication with clients

• Data entry and organizing information in documents or spreadsheets

• Following clear instructions and completing tasks accurately



Requirements

• Excellent written English (essential)

• Reliable internet connection

• Available during Australian business hours

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Reliable communication and responsiveness

Previous experience with research, data entry, or virtual assistant work is preferred but not essential.



Hours & Pay

Initially: 20 hours per week for 1–2 weeks

Paid weekly: Pay will be reviewed after the first month, with increases based on performance, output, and quality of work.



Growth Opportunity

This role starts with administrative support tasks, but we are looking for someone who wants to grow with the company.

A strong candidate may transition into a full-time client relations role, which includes:

• greater responsibility

• more client interaction

• higher pay



Interview Process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to attend a short video interview before a final decision is made.



Application Instructions



Please introduce yourself in no more than 3 sentences and briefly describe your experience with research or data entry.



Please complete the short 3-part task below.



Part 1 – Comprehension

Read the paragraph below and answer the question.

"When completing online research tasks, it is important to verify information before recording it. Information found online can sometimes be outdated or incorrect, so checking multiple sources can help improve accuracy."



Question:

In one or two sentences, explain why it is important to verify information when doing online research.



Part 2 – Writing

Please rewrite the following sentence so it sounds more professional:

"hi john i checked the spreadsheet but some of the information is missing can you send the correct details thanks"



Part 3 – Simple Task

Imagine you were given a spreadsheet with 100 businesses and needed to find the website and contact
 for each one.

Briefly explain the steps you would take to complete this task efficiently.



To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please begin your application with the word Harbour.

title: AI YouTube Video Editor
description:
Overview

An AI YouTube Editor is responsible for creating, editing, and optimizing video content using both traditional editing tools and AI-powered software. The role focuses on producing engaging, high-quality videos that align with audience preferences and platform algorithms.



Key Responsibilities

-Edit raw video footage into polished YouTube content (long-form and Shorts)

-Use AI tools to automate tasks such as captioning, cutting, and voice enhancement

-Add graphics, subtitles, sound effects, and transitions to improve engagement

-Optimize videos for YouTube (titles, thumbnails, pacing, retention strategies)

-Repurpose long-form content into short-form clips (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

-Enhance audio quality and remove background noise using AI tools

-Collaborate with content creators to match their style and branding

-Manage file organization and maintain efficient editing workflows

title: DevCo — Operations Coordinator
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're a small crypto/fintech development company building multiple products. We need an operations coordinator to run our AI-powered business systems daily, monitor outputs, flag issues, and keep the team informed. 



Think of it like a team captain — you make sure every play runs smoothly, every system delivers its result, and the coach (CEO) always knows the score. The difference is that most of your "players" are AI tools and automated processes. Your job is to trigger them, check their work, and improve them over time. 



This is not a traditional VA role. You will operate AI systems as the core of your job. If that excites you, keep reading.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



Daily operations: 

- Run automated business processes — content generation, invoicing, reporting, audit triggers 

- Check outputs — did the process produce the right result? Is the quality acceptable? 

- Flag issues immediately — "all systems green except these two, which need these inputs" 

- Prepare async updates for the CEO — short video or written briefings with clear agenda items



Communication: 

- Track action items from team calls and follow up on deadlines 

- Communicate with team members and external partners as needed 

- Maintain documentation — when a process changes, the docs change with it 



System improvement: 

-The systems you operate are designed to be iterated. When you notice something isn't working or could be better, you flag it, propose a fix, and help implement the improvement 

- You don't just follow instructions — you learn why each step exists and think about what's missing 

- Over time, you'll suggest new automations and process improvements based on what you observe 





WHAT YOU WON'T DO

- Build the systems from scratch (we have engineers for that) 

-Make strategic business decisions (CEO does that) 

- Manage other people (no direct reports to start)





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Must have: 

-You operate AI-powered systems daily — this is core, not optional 

-Strong attention to detail — you catch when an output isn't right 

-You think in steps — when something breaks, you trace back to which step failed and figure out why 

-Clear communicator — written and verbal English fluency. You can explain a problem and a solution in 2 sentences, not 20 

-Proactive — you flag problems before being asked. You prepare updates without being reminded. You don't wait to be told what to do 

-Not afraid to speak up — you raise points, flag issues immediately, and push back when something doesn't make sense 

-Comfortable learning new tools quickly — we'll teach you our specific systems, but you need to be someone who picks things up fast 



Nice to have: 

- Experience with crypto, fintech, or DeFi 

- Familiarity with Discord,
, social media management 

-Previous operations or process management experience 

- Experience working with international remote teams





DETAILS



Remote 

- The team lead is based in Morocco — working hours will need to align accordingly. Flexibility required. Weekends may be needed depending on project sprints. 

- ~20-30 hours/week to start, may grow 

- Starting at $500/month USD 

- 2-week paid trial period (probation) 

- Reports to: CEO + COO (during transition period for system learning) 

- Growth potential: this role can grow into a full operations manager position as the company scales 





HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Send your CV and a short video (3-5 minutes) to 
 



Video instructions: Record a short video (Loom, phone, any tool). Answer this scenario: 



"Imagine you start your day and you're responsible for checking 4 different automated systems — a report generator, an invoice tool, a content scheduler, and a monitoring alert system. Three ran perfectly overnight. One produced an error. Walk us through: How do you start your day? How do you check each system? When you find the error, what do you do? Who do you tell and how?" 



We're not looking for a perfect answer. We want to see how you think through problems. 



Step 2: If selected, you'll complete a short practical case study (30-60 minutes) 

Step 3: Interview with the team

title: Lead Prospector (Part-Time, Remote) Pay: $5-15/hour | Part-Time | Performance Bonuses Available
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE



We're a performance-driven digital marketing agency that runs paid ads, builds funnels, and deploys AI automation systems for local businesses, coaches, and agencies. To keep growing, we need a dedicated prospector who can find, qualify, and organize leads so our closers can do what they do best, close.

This is a performance-first role. If you love research, have a process, and take pride in delivering clean, qualified lead lists, you'll thrive here.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



1. Scrape and build targeted lead lists using Google Maps, Apollo, and similar platforms

2. Research and qualify local businesses, coaches, and service providers as potential clients

3. Find and verify owner contact info (name,
, phone, social handles)

4. Upload and organize leads into GoHighLevel CRM with accurate pipeline stages

5. Track your own output and hit daily/weekly lead quotas

6. Identify businesses with weak or no digital presence (ideal targets)

7. Assist with outreach list prep for cold
 and DM campaigns





REQUIREMENTS



1. Experience using GoHighLevel, you must know how to manage contacts and pipelines

2. Proven experience with Google Maps scraping (manual or tool-based)

3. Familiarity with lead tools like Apollo.io, Hunter.io, Clay, Instant Data Scraper, or similar

4. Strong attention to detail, no sloppy lists, no duplicate entries

5. Ability to work independently and hit targets without micromanagement

6. Reliable internet connection and consistent availability

7. Basic English communication (written updates, Slack/DM check-ins)





BONUS POINTS IF YOU HAVE



1. Experience prospecting for a marketing or lead generation agency

2. Knowledge of Meta Ads, funnels, or digital marketing in general

3. Experience with cold outreach 
 or DMs)

4. Familiarity with Instantly, Smartlead, or similar outreach platforms





JOB DETAILS



Rate: $5-15/hour

Type: Part-Time

Schedule: Flexible (EST timezone overlap preferred)

Bonuses: Performance-based bonuses available





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, your application MUST include the following:



A short Loom video (2–3 min) walking us through how you build a lead list from scratch

A sample lead list (even 20–50 leads) showing the format and data you collect

Tools you currently use for prospecting

Your GoHighLevel experience level (beginner / intermediate / advanced)



?? Applications without a Loom video or sample list will not be reviewed. This is non-negotiable.

Top candidates will be contacted within 48 hours for a paid trial task.

We are seeking a Social Media Manager to drive the growth of our online presence, build our personal and agency brand, and turn our content into a client acquisition machine. You’ll work closely with our copywriters, media team, and CEO to plan, create, and publish compelling content across multiple platforms.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Create high-converting content (reels, carousels, captions, short-form videos) using existing video footage, testimonials, and UGC

Repurpose long-form content (e.g. webinars, podcast, masterclasses) into short-form assets

Work with designers, editors, and writers to ensure quality output that aligns with our brand voice

Analyze performance data and iterate content based on insights and platform best practices



BRAND BUILDING & ENGAGEMENT

Grow and maintain a strong online presence for our CEO, COO and agency across all major platforms

Manage community engagement (responding to comments, DMs, and nurturing prospects)

Research trends, hooks, and viral formats to keep our content fresh and attention-grabbing

Create and maintain a swipe file of best-performing social content across industries



CAMPAIGN SUPPORT & LAUNCHES

Collaborate with our paid ads and funnel team to align organic content with launches and ongoing campaigns

Support
, ad, and launch strategies with complementary organic content

Track performance of content leading to conversions, leads, and webinar sign-ups

Brainstorm new content angles with the CEO and team for upcoming campaigns



REQUIREMENTS:

Strong command of English writing and storytelling (a must)

Proven experience managing social media for personal brands or agencies

A strong eye for design, layout, and visual storytelling (experience with Canva or Adobe tools is a plus)

Able to work independently and manage your own content calendar

Familiarity with marketing, sales psychology, and funnel strategy is preferred

Experience with Reels/TikTok editing, YouTube Shorts, or repurposing video content is a huge bonus

Obsessive about deadlines, details, and making things look damn good

Comfortable receiving feedback and iterating quickly



Bonus:

Experience working in the digital marketing, coaching, or SaaS space

Familiarity with GoHighLevel, Asana, Google Drive, or content scheduling tools





If you’re excited about building a social media machine that gets real business results and want to work with a high-performing, collaborative, and fun team — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Music Technology Professor Needs Assistant – Video Organization & Spreadsheets
description:
Grammy-nominated music producer and college professor (Silicon Valley, CA) is building a library of online music technology courses and needs a skilled remote assistant to help organize a large archive of video tutorials and educational content into structured playlists and spreadsheets.



This is a part-time, ongoing remote position. Work is flexible, but some overlap with California evening hours is preferred.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Organize and sort a large archive of music technology video tutorials (bookmarks and other file collections) into new course playlists and categories

- Tag and classify videos by topic: Pro Tools, Recording Techniques, Mixing & Mastering, Music Theory, etc.

- Design and maintain Excel and Google Spreadsheets to manage course content and video data

- Convert Excel files to HTML using Claude (AI-assisted workflow)

- Handle general file management with strong attention to naming conventions, folder structure, and accuracy



REQUIREMENTS



Must have:

- Strong background in music production and audio engineering

- Hands-on experience with at least one DAW (Pro Tools, REAPER, Logic, Ableton, etc.)

- Advanced Excel and Google Sheets skills – you build and manage complex workbooks

- Solid HTML skills – you can read, write, and edit HTML files confidently

- Excellent file management habits – clean naming, logical folder structure, zero sloppiness

- Clear written English communication

- Fast, reliable internet connection

- Availability for some overlap with California afternoon or evening hours (PST)



Nice to have:

- Experience with bookmark/content management tools

- Familiarity with online course platforms (Teachable, Canvas, etc.)

- Background in music education

- Can read and write music notation



PRACTICAL DETAILS



- Start: Immediately, with a small paid test project to confirm fit

- Hours: Part-time, flexible (hours vary week to week)

- Remote tools: AnyDesk for occasional access to professor's Mac

- Location: Open to applicants worldwide; Philippines-based candidates welcome



TO APPLY



Please tell me:

1. Your background in music and audio production

2. What DAW(s) you use

3. Your spreadsheet and HTML experience – how long, what kinds of projects

4. Your availability and hourly rate

title: Personal and Business Coordinator
description:
Position Overview

The Personal and Business Coordinator provides administrative, operational, and coordination support to the Owner across multiple business activities. This role ensures the smooth day-to-day management of schedules, communications, documentation, and operational tasks related to real estate, retail operations, and other business initiatives.



The position requires strong organizational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage both personal and business-related responsibilities in a professional and confidential manner.



Key Responsibilities

1. Administrative and Operational Support

Manage the Owner’s daily schedule, calendar, and appointments.



Handle personal and business-related errands, tasks, and requests as assigned.



Maintain organized digital and physical files, records, and documents.



Prepare purchase requests, reimbursement forms, and basic spreadsheets.



Assist in preparing simple financial tracking such as petty cash, expenses, and inventory updates.



Coordinate with internal staff, suppliers, riders, couriers, and service providers.



Support the Owner in organizing business-related meetings, events, or travel arrangements.



Ensure the confidentiality of all personal and business information.



2. Real Estate Support

Assist in preparing property listings and descriptions for posting on relevant platforms.



Handle client coordination, inquiry follow-ups, and communication related to rentals, sales, and property viewings.



Prepare and organize real estate documents including reservation forms, accreditation requirements, leasing documents, and turnover documents.



Maintain updated records of available units, client concerns, and transaction timelines.



Coordinate with brokers, property managers, developers, and clients when needed.



Assist with property inspections, documentation, and onsite coordination when required.



3. Flower Café and Retail Shop Support

Assist with daily operational tasks including inventory checks, restocking, ordering supplies, receiving deliveries, and supplier coordination.



Support preparation of café and flower shop documentation such as price lists, product forms, marketing materials, and reports.



Coordinate with staff regarding daily store concerns, operational needs, and schedules.



Assist in social media coordination including preparing captions, uploading content, and monitoring inquiries.



Help maintain overall organization, cleanliness, and order of the café and flower studio.



Provide occasional support with store setup and product arrangements when needed.



4. Communication and Coordination

Serve as a point of contact for internal and external communications as directed by the Owner.



Respond to
s, messages, calls, and inquiries on behalf of the Owner when required.



Provide status updates, reminders, and follow-ups on pending tasks and deliverables.



5. Special Projects and Miscellaneous Tasks

Assist with special projects assigned by the Owner related to new business initiatives, events, or product launches.



Perform other reasonable duties necessary for the smooth operation of the Owner’s businesses.



Provide flexible support across different business areas depending on operational needs.



Key Skills and Qualifications

Strong organizational and time management skills



Excellent communication and coordination abilities



Ability to multitask and manage multiple responsibilities



Attention to detail and problem-solving skills



Ability to maintain confidentiality and professionalism



Basic knowledge of administrative systems, spreadsheets, and documentation

title: VA- KDP Publishing Operations & Launch
description:
About This Role

Hill Country Publishing LLC is an independent publishing company producing non-fiction, self-help, business, and lifestyle titles across multiple genres and pen names. The catalog is actively growing with a structured launch sequence — multiple titles in production at any given time, spanning different audiences and subject areas.

This role exists to handle the operational layer of the publishing business: coordinating ARC (Advance Reader Copy) outreach, managing the review pipeline, executing launch tasks across Amazon KDP, and transitioning into ongoing market research as the catalog expands. The work is detail-oriented, process-driven, and genuinely important — reviews and launch execution are the primary levers that determine whether a self-published book succeeds or disappears.

This is a part-time role to start. For the right person who executes well, it grows into a long-term position with expanding responsibility across a growing multi-genre catalog.







How the Role Is Structured

The position has two distinct phases. The first six months are focused almost entirely on launching the current titles in the pipeline successfully. Once those launches are complete and generating reviews, the role transitions toward research and infrastructure for future titles across multiple genres.



Phase One

Launch & Reviews

Months 1–6





ARC Outreach and Coordination

•  Research and build a targeted list of ARC reviewers relevant to each title’s genre and audience — drawing from book communities on TikTok, Instagram, Goodreads, and genre-specific blogs

•  Identify 50–100 micro-influencers per title using genre-appropriate hashtags and community searches, targeting accounts with follower counts between 5K–50K and high engagement rates relative to their audience size

•  Find contact information (DM handles,
 addresses listed in bios, contact forms) and build a tracking spreadsheet with columns for platform, handle, follower count, engagement notes, contact date, response status, and copy sent

•  Send outreach messages using approved templates — all copy is pre-written and approved before sending; your job is accurate execution and tracking

•  Follow up once per contact, two weeks after initial outreach, using the approved follow-up template

•  Track all responses, log who is interested, coordinate digital copy delivery via BookFunnel or NetGalley (setup guidance provided), and update the tracker daily



Review Pipeline Management

•  Monitor Amazon reviews for both books daily and log all new reviews with date, star rating, and key content in the tracking sheet

•  Flag reviews that may warrant an author response (positive reviews worth acknowledging, critical reviews that contain factual errors) for author approval before any response is drafted

•  Track Goodreads reviews and ratings separately from Amazon

•  Send a weekly review summary every Monday with total review count, star rating average, notable new reviews, and any flagged items requiring attention

•  Monitor for verified vs. unverified purchase status on Amazon reviews and flag any patterns that look like policy violations for the author to assess



KDP Launch Execution

•  Manage the pre-launch checklist for each title: verify book description is live, confirm A+ Content is approved, check that all seven keyword fields are populated, confirm category selections are correct, and verify pricing is set correctly across all formats

•  Coordinate the $0.99 launch pricing window — set the price change date, confirm it goes live, and flag when it’s time to move to the next pricing tier per the approved schedule

•  Monitor Amazon Best Seller Rank (BSR) daily during launch week and log rankings in the tracking sheet every morning

•  Check that all book formats (ebook and paperback) are properly linked on the Amazon product page

•  Submit A+ Content updates when new material is provided by the author



Influencer and Community Outreach Tracking

•  Monitor for TikTok and Instagram posts mentioning the books or the author name and log any organic mentions in the outreach tracker

•  Screenshot and save any social media content featuring the books for the author’s records

•  Research and maintain a running list of BookTok creators, genre-specific influencers, and community figures who would be appropriate for outreach as new titles launch across different categories



Phase Two

Research & Catalog Growth

Months 6+





Niche and Market Research

•  Use Publisher Rocket, Book Bolt, and Amazon’s own search to identify keyword opportunities across the genres and categories in Hill Country Publishing’s active catalog

•  Monitor the top 20 competing titles in the primary categories monthly: track their review counts, BSR trends, pricing changes, and any new entrants worth flagging

•  Identify underserved niches across multiple genres — topics with demonstrated search demand, low competition, and weak existing titles — and surface them for the publisher’s consideration

•  Research content ideas for future books by monitoring what questions, topics, and pain points generate engagement in relevant Reddit communities, Goodreads groups, TikTok comment sections, and genre-specific online communities

•  Compile a monthly niche research report in a standard format (template provided) summarizing the top opportunities, notable competitor activity, and suggested focus areas for the author’s consideration



Ongoing Catalog Maintenance

•  Maintain a master spreadsheet tracking all published titles with current BSR, review count, star average, pricing, and active promotional status updated weekly

•  Flag titles whose rankings are declining significantly for the author’s attention

•  Research and shortlist Amazon Advertising keyword opportunities for the author to review and approve before any ads are created or modified

•  Coordinate ARC outreach for new titles as they enter the launch pipeline, using the established process from Phase One







What We’re Looking For

The most important qualities for this role are attention to detail, reliable follow-through, and clear communication. The tasks are well-defined and process-driven — what matters is executing them accurately and consistently, flagging issues when they arise, and never leaving the author wondering what’s happening.



Required

•  Prior experience with Amazon KDP — you understand the dashboard, know what BSR means, and have helped authors or publishers manage titles before

•  Experience with influencer or ARC outreach — you’ve built contact lists, sent templated outreach, and managed response tracking in a spreadsheet

•  Strong English written communication — outreach messages represent the author’s brand; grammar, tone, and professionalism matter

•  Reliable daily availability during the launch phase — launch weeks require morning check-ins and same-day updates, not 48-hour response windows

•  Proficiency in Google Sheets or Excel — you build clean, well-organized trackers and maintain them consistently



Preferred

•  Familiarity with Publisher Rocket, Book Bolt, or similar KDP research tools

•  Experience with BookFunnel or NetGalley for ARC distribution

•  Active presence in or familiarity with BookTok, Bookstagram, Goodreads, or genre-specific online reading communities

•  Experience supporting self-published authors specifically (not just Amazon FBA or retail sellers — the workflows are different)

•  Genuine interest in books and publishing across multiple genres — you read, you follow the industry, and you find the business of books interesting







What This Role Is Not

Being clear about this upfront saves everyone time.



•  You will not be writing copy, making editorial decisions, or creating content. All outreach messages, listing copy, and response drafts are written and approved by the author before you send or post anything.

•  You will not be making strategic decisions about pricing, categories, or advertising spend. You will execute decisions that have already been made and flag situations where a decision is needed.

•  You will not be managing social media accounts. Monitoring for mentions and logging them is part of the role; creating or posting content is not.

•  You will not need to purchase anything or access payment systems. Physical copy shipping (if needed) is handled separately.







Weekly Deliverables

Every week, the author expects the following with no chasing required:



•  Monday morning: Weekly review summary (new reviews across all platforms, star rating update, any flagged items)

•  Monday morning: ARC outreach tracker update (new contacts added, responses received, copies sent)

•  Friday afternoon: BSR and ranking log update for all active titles

•  As needed: Same-day flagging of anything urgent — a review that needs attention, a listing issue, an influencer response requiring follow-up



A note on communication style:



Weekly updates should be brief and scannable — bullet points, not paragraphs. If something needs the author’s decision or attention, say so directly in the first line. If everything is on track, say that clearly too. The author doesn’t want to read between the lines to figure out the status of their business.



Hours and Compensation

This role starts at 10–15 hours per week during the launch phase, with a higher concentration of hours in launch weeks (up to 20 hours during a book’s first two weeks on sale). Phase Two transitions to a more consistent 8–12 hours per week.



Growth Path

This role is designed to grow with the catalog. Hill Country Publishing LLC plans to publish multiple titles per year across a range of genres and audiences. A VA who executes Phase One well and demonstrates good judgment becomes the natural person to own the research and launch infrastructure for every title that follows — regardless of genre or pen name.

Longer-term, this could include coordinating with cover designers and formatters, managing a small ARC reader community, running Amazon Sponsored Products campaigns (training provided), and eventually leading the launch process for new titles with minimal author oversight. That growth depends entirely on demonstrated reliability in the foundational work first.







How to Apply

Please respond with the following. Applications that don’t include all four elements will not be reviewed — this is itself a test of whether you read and follow instructions carefully.



•  1. KDP experience summary: Describe specifically what you’ve done on Amazon KDP. What types of books, what tasks, how many titles, for how long. Generic "I have Amazon experience" does not qualify.

•  2. ARC or outreach example: Describe a specific outreach or review campaign you’ve managed. What was the book or product, how many contacts did you reach, what was the response rate, and how did you track it?

•  3. Tracker sample: Share a link to or screenshot of a spreadsheet you’ve built to manage a similar workflow. It doesn’t need to be KDP-specific — it needs to show that you build organized, functional tracking systems.

•  4. Availability and rate: Your weekly availability in hours, your timezone, your rate, and which platform you prefer to work through.



One more thing:

Start your application with the phrase “Ready to launch.” If you don’t, your application will not be reviewed. This confirms you read the full job description before applying.



Questions about the role can be asked before applying. We typically respond within 48 hours. Interviews are conducted via video call and are approximately 30 minutes. Successful candidates start with a paid two-week trial period before a longer-term agreement is confirmed.

title: Spopify Expert - Dropshipping
description:
Project Scope: PetCozy Store Optimization & Launch Prep – petcozy.shop

Objective

To transform PetCozy.shop from a basic template into a high-conversion, professional brand by fixing technical errors, enhancing the user experience (UX), and implementing a complete SEO and Trust framework.



Phase 1: Brand Integrity & Trust Configuration

Content Cleanup: Audit the entire site to fix typos and remove placeholder text. Crucial: Remove any mentions of external brands (e.g., "Petsstore," "Petsshop," "PetFindsUSA") from all pages and product titles.

Legal & Essential Pages: Build out and format the Contact, Shipping, Returns, and Privacy Policy pages.

Brand Story: Update the "Our Story" section with professional copywriting that aligns with the PetCozy brand.

Trust Signals: Integrate real trust badges (Secure Checkout, Satisfaction Guarantee) on product pages and the footer. Add clear contact information to the footer to build consumer confidence.



Phase 2: Shopping Experience & Conversion Optimization (CRO)

Collection Management: Organize products into logical collections. Implement advanced sidebar filters (Price, Pet Type, Size), sorting options, and pagination.

Product Page Overhaul: * Implement "Tabbed" descriptions (Description, Shipping Info, Specs).

Add a "Related Products" or "Frequently Bought Together" section.

Integrate a customer review app (e.g., Judge.me) with star ratings visible on collection pages.

Conversion Tools: Set up a subtle, non-intrusive newsletter pop-up and an automated Abandoned Cart recovery
 flow.

Mobile & UX Tweaks: Optimize the mobile layout for "thumb-friendly" navigation and ensure the "Add to Cart" process is seamless.



Phase 3: Technical Performance & SEO

Speed Optimization: * Compress all site assets and product images without losing quality.

Implement Lazy-Loading for images to improve Initial Page Load time.

On-Page SEO: * Rewrite Product Titles and Meta Descriptions to be "human-friendly" and keyword-optimized (no Amazon-style keyword stuffing).



Add descriptive Alt-Text to all images for Google Image search visibility.

Content Boost: Format the blog section and ensure the layout is clean for future content. Ensure Google Search Console and tracking are correctly configured.



Deliverable Requirements

Zero Placeholders: No generic "lorem ipsum" or "Template" text remaining.

Mobile First: The store must be fully responsive and load in under 3 seconds on mobile.

No Broken Links: All navigation links and social media icons must be functional.

We’re looking for someone reliable, organized, and able to communicate clearly and naturally in English. We're looking for someone with a *Bachelor’s degree* and *experience working at international companies or with international clients*.

-Manage scheduling and coordinate meetings across time zones

-Draft and send clear, professional
s

-Book travel (flights, hotels, logistics)

-Conduct research and compare options (vendors, services, tools)

-Track expenses, receipts, and payments in an organized way

-Follow up with vendors, service providers, and contacts

-Help with personal and household coordination when needed



What We’re Looking For:

-Strong English communication (written & spoken)

-Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

-Comfortable working independently and managing multiple tasks

-Good judgment and problem-solving ability

-Experience working with international clients 



How to Apply:



Please keep your application short and clear. Send an
 with the following information



 subject: Onlinejobs.ph Executive Assistant Role - [your full name] 



Then answer these 3 questions:



1. Scheduling

You need to schedule a meeting between 3 people in different time zones (New York, Tel Aviv, and Bangkok), and each person has limited availability. How would you approach this step-by-step?



2. Inbox + Prioritization 

It’s 9:00 AM and you see the following messages from us:



“Can you book a flight for tomorrow morning to Singapore?”

“We need to reschedule my 2PM call — conflict just came up.”

“Did we pay the invoice from last week?”

“Please find a good math tutor for my child.”

“Reminder — I need the expense summary today.”



What would you do first, second, third, etc.?

Walk us through your thinking step-by-step.

You can also mention what tools or actions you would take.



3. Organizational system

Please explain exactly how you would track and manage the following on a daily basis:

-Tasks

-Expenses / receipts / payments

-Follow-ups (e.g.,
s, vendors, ongoing items)



Be specific:



What tools would you use?

How would you structure the information?

How would you make sure nothing is missed?



If helpful, you can give a simple example of how your system would look.

Applications that do not meet the minimum criteria will be automatically rejected.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Key Responsibilities

s and communications

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------



Working Hours



Full-Time

title: Nurse Advocate
description:
We are seeking a Remote Nurse Advocate to provide high-quality patient support and ensure smooth delivery of mental health services. This role focuses on patient communication, appointment coordination, case documentation, and assistance with forms, pharmacy issues, telepsychiatry processes, and care navigation.



Responsibilities



Provide empathetic emotional support to patients throughout their treatment.



Assist patients with registration, onboarding, and understanding telepsychiatry platforms.



Help complete disability forms and support physicians with accommodation letters.



Coordinate lab work appointments and assist patients in obtaining medical records.



Guide patients through pharmacy or prescription-related issues.



Resolve support escalations through Zoom calls or virtual communication.



Advocate for patient rights, needs, and access to care.



Manage appointment scheduling, rescheduling, and notifications of any changes.



Assist with out-of-network claims and respond to billing or payment-related queries.



Maintain accurate documentation of patient interactions and provider schedules.



Collaborate with multidisciplinary teams and coordinate care with external providers.



Identify and communicate opportunities to improve patient care and service delivery.



Requirements



Degree in Psychology, Social Work, Healthcare Administration, Nursing, Pharmacist or a related field.



Minimum 5 years of experience as a Patient Advocate, Clinical Coordinator, or similar role.



Excellent English communication skills (C1 level).



Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to engage compassionately with diverse patient populations.



High attention to detail with strong organizational and documentation skills.



Knowledge of mental health conditions and treatment modalities (preferred).



Familiarity with telehealth platforms and virtual care technologies.



Ability to work independently and as part of a team of four, take the initiative, and maintain strict confidentiality.



This position is not focused on backend tasks; the candidate should be comfortable working one-on-one with doctors.



Availability to work from 9 AM to 6 PM EST, Monday–Friday or Sunday–Thursday.

title: Personal Credit Repair Specialist (Advanced – US Credit Expert Only)
description:
About the Role



We are hiring an experienced U.S. Credit Repair Specialist to actively manage and optimize two personal credit profiles.



This is NOT a beginner role. We are looking for someone who already understands real credit repair strategy — not just sending template disputes.



Your goal is to help move already-good credit into the excellent tier (740–800+) through intelligent optimization, dispute strategy, and credit structure planning.



?



Current Situation



You will work with two established credit files:



Profile A

 • FICO ~700

 • Strong accounts with some historical late payments

 • No collections

 • Needs optimization + targeted dispute strategy



Profile B

 • FICO ~688–730 range

 • Mostly positive history

 • Minor negative marks

 • Goal: reach top-tier credit



This is optimization and precision work — not basic repair.



?



Your Responsibilities



You will:

 • Perform full credit analysis (Experian, Equifax, TransUnion)

 • Identify legally disputable items

 • Draft custom dispute and goodwill letters

 • Manage bureau disputes and follow-ups

 • Track dispute cycles and results

 • Recommend utilization and payment timing strategies

 • Advise on account positioning (AU accounts, balances, limits)

 • Create monthly progress reports

 • Recommend next-step credit actions



?



Required Experience (Must Have)



? 2+ years working with U.S.-based credit repair clients

? Deep understanding of:

 • FICO scoring factors

 • Late payment removal strategies

 • Goodwill adjustment requests

 • Credit utilization optimization

 • Authorized user strategy

 • Credit bureau dispute workflows

 • Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) basics



? Excellent written English

? Extremely detail oriented



?



DO NOT APPLY IF



? You only send template dispute letters

? You have no real U.S. credit experience

? You rely only on automated software without analysis

? You are an agency



?



Preferred (Big Bonus)

 • Credit Repair Cloud experience

 • Knowledge of Metro 2 reporting

 • Experience raising scores from 650–720 ? 780+

 • Financial or lending background



?



Work Details

 • Remote (Philippines preferred)

 • 5–10 hours per week initially

 • Long-term role if results are strong

 • Flexible hours

 • Direct communication with owner



?



Compensation

 • Hourly or fixed monthly (based on experience)

 • Performance bonuses possible for measurable score improvements



?



Application Instructions



To apply, include:

 1. Your experience with U.S. credit repair

 2. Example credit score improvements you achieved

 3. Your dispute process (brief explanation)

 4. Tools/software you use

 5. Your hourly rate

 6. Start your message with the word “OPTIMIZE”



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.



?
