title: Creative Strategist & Content Producer
description:
About the company

At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health & improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain & discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain & distress others have to endure.

Job description

We're looking for a Creative Strategist & Content Producer to shape how our health & pharmaceutical brands communicate across both digital & offline channels. You'll craft effective strategies that translate scientific credibility into compelling storytelling & creative assets - helping us engage our diverse audience as we expand our presence regionally. 



The Creative Strategist & Content Producer will be the visionary link between our brand identity, compelling content creation & drive measurable performance across all key channels. This role is responsible for developing & testing high-impact creative strategies as well as producing content assets (visual, video, copy) internally, specifically designed to drive traffic, increase conversion rates, lower Customer Acquisition Cost (CAC) & drive overall revenue growth for our Shopify, Shopee & Lazada stores via social media as well as paid advertising platforms.



You'll work across multiple channels & markets to plan, create & optimize content that builds awareness, strengthens partnerships & supports the new channels of the business. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys balancing creativity, analytics & brand strategy in the health supplement industry. 



Key Responsibilities:

Creative Strategy

- Platform & Channel Strategy: Craft tailored creative strategies for B2C & B2B audiences optimized for platform-specific best practices & formats that align with brand goals & regulatory requirements in each market (e.g., Meta carousel ads, vertical video for TikTok/Reels, static product carousels for Shopee/Lazada e-commerce banner ads).

- Hypothesis Generation & A/B Testing: Develop robust creative testing matrices, formulate clear hypotheses for creative elements (hooks, calls-to-action, visual styles, copy length) that drive measurable improvements in Click-Through Rate (CTR) & Conversion Rate (CVR).

- Audience Segmentation: Translate target audience data & segmentation provided by media buyers into resonant creative themes, ensuring content speaks directly to different stages of the marketing funnel (awareness, consideration, conversion).

- Competitive Analysis: Continuously keep up to date with competitors & industry trends, identifying new & successful creative formats, hooks & messaging to finetune our strategy.

In-House Content Production & Execution 

- Performance Creative Development: Lead the end-to-end creative concept development & production for all organic & paid media campaigns (Meta, TikTok, Google/YouTube, etc.) that align with brand & campaign goals, focusing on high-volume, quick-turnaround testing required for performance marketing.

- Hands-on Asset Creation: Directly produce & edit native social content & performance ads using existing assets, stock libraries & internal resources. This includes:

i. Plan platform-specific content calendars: Cover educational, promotional & corporate communications

ii. Static/Image Editing: Adapt product photography, create ad variations & design simple graphics & banner ads

iii. Video Editing: Fast-paced assembly, cutting, adding text overlays, music & effects for short-form, vertical video (UGC-style, product demos, testimonials)

- Copywriting: Develop high-converting ad copy, landing page headlines & social media captions that align with the creative strategy & brand voice, with a focus on clear value propositions & strong CTAs.

- Asset Management: Ensure all campaign assets are correctly tagged, archived & deployed across relevant channels (Shopify, Shopee, Lazada store fronts & advertising platforms).

- Testing & Optimization: apply insights & analytics to refine & optimize content effectiveness across platforms.

Performance & Reporting

- Data-Driven Insights: Work closely with the Marketing Manager to analyze creative performance reports, identifying which creative variables are driving results (or failing) across Shopify, Shopee & Lazada traffic.

- Iteration & Optimization: 

i. Develop, adapt or review content & formats to improve engagement & performance

ii. Use performance data (ROAS, CPA, CTR, CVR) to rapidly iterate on existing creative assets & inform future strategy, ensuring a continuous cycle of improvement & optimization

Storefront Integration: Integrate winning creative messages & visuals onto the respective e-commerce storefronts (product pages, banners) to ensure a cohesive customer journey.

Multi-Channel Storytelling

- Content cohesion: Ensure content is aligned where possible across digital & print media, including LinkedIn, Instagram,
, YouTube, e-commerce platforms, brochures & trade materials.

- Tailor content: To achieve relevance & effectiveness across different stages of the audience journey — from brand awareness & education to conversion.

- Storytelling & visual consistency: To strengthen brand trust & recognition.

Compliance & Brand Integrity

- Uphold regulatory & ethical communication standards across all marketing activities.

- Ensure all content complies with regulatory guidelines & marketing requirements in each country we operate in, including product claims, advertising language & digital promotions.

- Maintain brand credibility by ensuring all communications are factual & aligned with company values.

- Collaborate with internal teams to review materials for accuracy, effectiveness & compliance before publication.



Requirements:

- 3–5 years of experience in creative strategy, content creation, social media, or brand marketing — ideally in health supplements, healthcare or wellness.

- Strong understanding of social media trends & platform best practices (Meta (FB/IG), LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Generative AI).

- Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools.

- Excellent writing, editing & visual storytelling skills — adopt a strategic approach to design that integrates marketing & commercial goals.

- Excellent communication, project management & cross-functional collaboration skills.

- Familiarity with regulatory communication standards or track record in health supplements or healthcare industry is a plus.



Please send your applications to

title: Brand & Content Designer (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
Job description



At Miraco Nutripharm, we are dedicated to advancing health and improving lives. Our goal is to relieve 1 billion people worldwide of pain and discomfort. If you know of anyone who has been worried about or suffered from any health problems, join us in making a positive impact by reducing the pain and distress others have to endure.



We’re seeking a full-time Brand and Content Designer to lead the creative direction of our brand across packaging, offline marketing, and digital platforms. This role is ideal for a strategic, hands-on creative who can own both design and content production, from ideation to execution, while supporting our expansion across Southeast Asia and global markets.



As a key member of the team, you'll be responsible for producing compelling visuals and content that reflect the heart of our brand and connect meaningfully with consumers, healthcare professionals, and distribution partners.



Key Responsibilities:



-Brand Development & Creative Direction-

*Lead development of visual identity for new and existing brands, including logos, packaging, brand guidelines, typography and brand story

*Propose and implement creative directions from Pantone color palettes to iconography, font systems and photography guidelines

*Establish and maintain consistent branding across all physical and digital touchpoints, while ensuring all brand assets are stored and updated in an organized, easily accessible database



-Graphic & Marketing Design-

*Design high-impact materials such as product packaging, brochures, point-of-sale displays, in-store visuals and Continuing Medical Education (CME) event collaterals

*Develop pitch decks, sales presentations and brand kits for internal and external stakeholders

*Create visuals for promotions, campaigns, and trade shows for greater awareness and conversion



-Content Creation & Copywriting-

*Collaborate with the team to develop content ideas and messaging for various platforms (digital ads, social media, web,
)

*Write and edit marketing copy as needed, including taglines, brand messaging, product descriptions, and promotional materials

*Contribute to storytelling, campaign ideation, consumer education initiatives, and customer loyalty initiatives



-Digital & Multimedia Content-

*Produce digital assets for ecommerce platforms, social media ads, newsletters, and display ads (Google Ads Meta, TikTok)

*Edit videos and animations for campaigns, tutorials, events, and educational content using tools like CapCut, Premiere Pro, or After Effects

*Repurpose content across multiple formats and languages when applicable



-Cross-Functional Collaboration-

*Work closely with marketing, sales, pharmacists and leadership to turn strategic goals into compelling creative output

*Participate in product launch discussions and brand development brainstorming sessions

*Coordinate with external freelancers or vendors as needed



-Regional Support & Market Expansion-

*Adapt assets for regional markets including Singapore, Malaysia, Mainland China & Hong Kong and future expansion areas

*Ensure consistency across regions while accounting for local cultural, language, market and regulatory differences



-Requirements-

*Minimum 3–5 years of experience in graphic design, brand development, content creation, or multimedia production

*Strong portfolio showcasing design, branding, and content/copywriting capabilities across print and digital

*Proficient in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, Premiere Pro), CapCut, Canva, Figma, or similar tools

*Excellent understanding of branding, packaging, digital marketing, and customer communication

*Creative thinker with strong attention to detail and an eye for aesthetic balance

*Highly organized, self-driven, and able to manage multiple timelines in a fast-paced environment

*Strong communication and collaboration skills, especially in remote work settings

*Experience in the health, wellness, pharmaceutical, or consumer goods sector is a plus

*Degree in Design, Marketing, Communications, or a related field preferred but not mandatory



Kindly submit your updated CV and sample portfolio to 
 for our review.

title: Pricelabs Revenue Manager
description:
PeachHaus Group is hiring an experienced PriceLabs Revenue Manager to oversee revenue management for approximately 15 short-term rental listings.



We are looking for someone who knows how to use PriceLabs strategically, not just someone who adjusts prices mechanically. You should understand occupancy pacing, seasonality, lead time, gap night strategy, minimum stay optimization, market demand, event-based pricing, and how to increase overall booking revenue while protecting ADR.



What you will be responsible for:



Managing pricing and revenue strategy for about 15 STR listings

Optimizing nightly rates, minimum stays, gap nights, orphan nights, and last-minute discounts

Monitoring market trends, competitor behavior, occupancy pacing, and local demand

Adjusting PriceLabs settings to improve booking performance and revenue

Reviewing listing performance regularly and making proactive pricing decisions

Identifying underperforming listings and implementing revenue improvement strategies

Communicating clearly about what changes were made and why



Requirements:



Proven experience using PriceLabs for short-term rentals

Strong understanding of STR revenue management

Experience managing multiple listings at once

Ability to show real examples of how you increased booking revenue, occupancy, ADR, or RevPAR

Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail

Reliable communication and professional follow-through



Important:

Only applicants who can present real experience and clearly explain how they increased booking revenue for STR listings should apply.



When applying, please include:



A short summary of your PriceLabs and STR revenue management experience

The number of listings you have managed

Specific examples of results you achieved

What strategies you used to improve revenue

Any screenshots, case studies, or references that support your experience



Please send applications to:

title: AI-Savvy Sales Setter & Digital Marketer (US Beauty Education Brand)
description:
We are an elite hair education brand based in the US (with operations in Vietnam) looking for a proactive, tech-savvy Sales Setter. Your goal is not just "engagement" ..it is to convert followers into students for our "Haircut by Design" online courses. You will use AI tools to scale content production and manage DM conversations with professional stylists.



Key Responsibilities

AI Content Orchestration: Use tools like ChatGPT/Claude to repurpose my educational videos into high-conversion captions and Reels scripts.



The "Setter" System: Manage Instagram/Facebook DMs. You will create scripts (with our guidance) to "warm up" leads and guide them to purchase the Foundations mini-course and the Fundamentals full course



Automation Management: Basic management of ManyChat (comment-to-DM automation) to ensure no lead is left behind.



Outbound Outreach: Identify and engage with US-based salons and stylists to build brand awareness.



Reporting: Track daily "Conversations Started" vs. "Course Sales" to ensure high ROI.



Requirements

Near-Native English: You must be able to communicate with high-end US stylists in a professional, editorial tone.



AI Proficiency: Experience using AI for copywriting and basic video editing (CapCut/Descript/Edits) is a must.



US Shift Availability: Must be available to engage with leads during US Central or Eastern business hours (part-time or full-time).



Sales Mindset: You enjoy "the hunt" and feel comfortable asking for the sale once a lead is qualified.



How to Apply

Briefly describe your experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, ManyChat, CapCut etc.).



Provide an example of a "Hook" for a video about "The Fundamentals of Haircutting."



Include the word "PRECISION" in your subject line so I know you read the full post.

title: GoHighLevel & Web Systems Specialist
description:
About Us

One Life Academy is an Australian property flipping education business based on the Gold Coast. We teach everyday Australians how to flip properties using creative finance strategies. We are in our early growth stage and building out the systems and infrastructure that will carry the business forward.



The Role

We are looking for a GoHighLevel specialist to come in, help us set up our CRM and automations properly from the ground up, and then manage and maintain everything on an ongoing basis as the business grows.



This is a contract role, not a fixed hourly or salaried position. We are a lean, early-stage business and we need someone who is happy to grow with us.



What You'll Be Working On

GoHighLevel (primary focus)

- Auditing and cleaning up our existing GHL setup

- Building out pipelines, workflows, and automations correctly

- Setting up and refining
 and SMS nurture sequences

- Managing leads as they come through and ensuring the pipeline stays organised

- Ongoing maintenance and improvements as the business scales




v (secondary focus)

- Managing and updating our website built on 
v

- Making changes as directed by the founder

- Must be familiar with the platform already



What We're Looking For

- Solid, hands-on GoHighLevel experience, you need to already know the platform well

- Comfortable building workflows, automations, and sequences from scratch

- Strong written English for
 and SMS copy

- Proactive and self-managed, we are a small team and need someone who takes initiative

- Honest about what they know and what they don't

- Open to a contract arrangement with room to grow as the business does





To Apply

Please include the following:

- A brief intro about yourself and your background

- Specific GHL systems you have built or managed previously

- Screenshots or a Loom video walkthrough of past work (highly regarded)

- Your availability

- Your contract rate or project-based pricing



Applications without GHL examples will not be considered.



A Note on the Role

We are being transparent: we are early stage. This is not a high-volume, fully operational business yet. But we are moving quickly, we know what we are building, and we want the right person in this seat from the start. If you are someone who likes being part of something from the beginning and doing work that actually matters, this could be a great fit.

title: Associate Customer Service Executive
description:
About Propseller



In 2024, Propseller has been ranked #1 Fastest-Growing Real Estate Company in APAC by the Financial Times and #10 in Singapore’s fastest-growing companies 2024 by The Straits Times and Statista !



In August 2022, Propseller raised a US$12M Series A led by Vertex Ventures, the VC arm of Temasek, the investment company owned by the Government of Singapore and the Series A lead investor of Grab.



Propseller’s mission is to help people build wealth with real estate. We’re building an end-to-end real estate transaction platform and towards that goal, we started the journey by building a technology-powered real estate brokerage that is valuable, reliable and fairly priced.



By elevating the most human part of the service with top in-house agents and industrialising all the rest with technology and centralised operations, we became Singapore's most loved real estate agent with an average Google My Business rating of 4.8/5 (800+ reviews).



The next phase of the journey is to go from helping people sell their homes to becoming the No. 1 brand for people to move from one home to the next: sell, buy, and finance.



Find out more at: 
/careers/.



Role Description



We are looking for a cheerful, fast, and client-obsessed individual to join us as an Associate Customer Service Executive working remotely from the Philippines. In this role, you will support our team of Real Estate Consultants in Singapore by answering inbound enquiries, qualifying buyers, and coordinating property viewings, all while delivering a seamless and professional experience to every prospect.



You will play a key role in shaping the first impression of Propseller. Speed, accuracy, empathy, and organisation will be essential to succeed. If you love helping people, are naturally resourceful, and can thrive in a high-performance remote team, we would love to hear from you.



Duties & Responsibilities



- Handle inbound enquiries across multiple channels (mainly WhatsApp and phone calls), always delivering clear and professional communication

- Qualify potential buyers expressing interest in our listings, collect key information, and help guide them toward the next step in their buying journey

- Coordinate and (re)schedule property viewings, ensuring alignment between client availability and our internal team’s agenda to maximise each sales opportunity

- Search, review, and update information in our CRM system to ensure data accuracy and enrich listing details

- Track and manage your daily activities and client interactions through our internal platforms

- Contribute to regular performance reporting and join team discussions aimed at improving processes and client experience

- Support special projects and ad-hoc tasks as part of our continuous improvement culture



Ideal Candidate



You have at least 1 year of experience in a remote customer service role, and you genuinely enjoy helping people. You are organised, thoughtful, and confident in managing multiple tasks in a fast-paced, digital environment.



You understand what great service feels like, and you know how to deliver it, even remotely. You have a strong attention to detail, ensuring accuracy in everything you do, from client communication to system updates. You take pride in creating smooth, efficient, and positive experiences for clients, and you are not afraid to push for results when needed.



You are proactive, coachable, and always looking for ways to improve.



Requirements



- Diploma or equivalent qualification

- 1 year experience required in a remote customer service role

- Fluent in written and spoken English, with the ability to communicate clearly and professionally via chat and phone

- Comfortable using Google Workspace, CRMs, and digital tools in general

- High level of attention to detail, especially when updating client records and coordinating viewings

- Strong ability to multitask and stay focused under pressure

- Reliable internet connection and remote working setup suitable for daily video calls and platform use

- Organised, proactive, and customer-obsessed, always striving to deliver a premium experience



You Get



- Remote: Deliver output from the comfort of your home while contributing directly to a fast-growing, tech-enabled real estate company based in Singapore.

- Structured support & training: Get onboarded with clear guidance, regular check-ins, and ongoing coaching to help you thrive

- Performance-based bonus: Be rewarded directly for your results

- Above-market compensation: Receive competitive pay that reflects your skills and performance, significantly higher than local customer service contracts

- Exposure to startup culture: Join a high-performing and caring team that values initiative, learning, and collaboration, without the rigid structure of corporate environments

- Purpose & impact: Play a meaningful role in shaping the home-buying and selling experience of clients in one of life’s biggest milestones



Recruiting Process



Ideal length: couple of days



Interview Process



1. Online Test (30min)

2. Screening - Online (30min) - Introductory Call with Talent Acquisition Associate

3. Interview (1h) - Meeting with Success and Service Manager (role play)

4. DILO - Online (1 Full day) - Day-in-the-life with training and job simulation (paid DILO)



Compensation



- $4 per hour

- Monthly performance-based bonus of up to $100

title: Customer Manager | Google Ads VA
description:
$6/hour | Full-Time | Monday–Friday, 9AM–5PM UK Time



?? IMPORTANT: Applications without "Value Ad" in the message subject will be ignored. Applicants without Google Ads experience will be ignored. 



About Us

We're a small, close-knit team running a Google and Meta Ads agency on Fiverr. We help businesses grow through paid advertising and we're looking for a Customer Manager to be the key link between our team and our clients.

This isn't a "sit and wait for instructions" role. We need someone who takes ownership, thinks on their feet, and genuinely cares about delivering a great client experience. There's real room to grow here, both in responsibility and pay, as we continue to scale.



What You'll Be Doing

Client Communication



Be the main point of contact for customers from order start to delivery

Collect access to client accounts (Google Ads, Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, Meta Ads, websites, etc.)

Keep clients updated on their order progress and deliver completed work

Handle questions, concerns, and follow-ups with professionalism and warmth



Operations & Admin



Manage internal tickets related to customer orders

Update and maintain SOPs and knowledge base documents

Other admin tasks as needed to keep things running smoothly



Must-Have Requirements



Native-level English: You'll be communicating directly with English-speaking clients, so this is non-negotiable



Highly organised: You can juggle multiple clients and tasks without letting things slip



Proactive and independent: You don't wait to be told what to do. You see what needs doing and you do it



Thinks beyond SOPs: You follow processes, but you also know when to use common sense and adapt



Google Ads experience: You've created at least a search campaign and understand how the platform works



Google Analytics experience: You've created at least a report and can navigate the interface confidently



Google Tag Manager understanding: You know what it does, how it fits into the tracking setup, and can find your way around it





Ideal Candidate

You tick all the must-have boxes AND you've built most or all Google Ads campaign types, and you've set up conversion tracking using Google Analytics and Google Tag Manager. If that's you, we definitely want to hear from you.



Tools We Use

Fiverr, Slack, Gmail, Zoom, Notion, Google Docs, Google Asd, Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Merchant Centre



How to Apply



Share a 30-second video recording of you introducing yourself

title: Customer Manager, Fiverr Startup Consulting Business (Pitch Decks, Business Plans, Founder Support)
description:
About Us



We run a consulting business on Fiverr that helps entrepreneurs, startups, and small businesses build investor ready materials and improve their professional presence.



Our services include pitch decks, business plans, market research, LinkedIn optimisation, and startup advisory. Our clients range from early stage founders preparing to raise capital to established businesses refining their strategy.



We are looking for someone to manage incoming client messages and support day to day communication. You will often be the first point of contact for potential clients, so professionalism, clarity, and responsiveness are essential.



You must also be comfortable communicating with founders and discussing business ideas, investor materials, and project requirements.



We will begin with a paid one week trial to ensure the role is a good fit for both sides. There is also potential for a commission scheme based on converted leads and order support as the role grows.



What You’ll Be Doing



Client Communication



• Monitor Fiverr inbox and order messages

• Respond to new client inquiries using internal guidelines and templates

• Ask the right questions to understand the client’s business and project requirements

• Request documents, links, and supporting materials from clients

• Guide clients through the process of starting projects such as pitch decks or business plans

• Keep clients updated on order progress

• Escalate complex questions when needed



Order Support



• Help collect the required information for projects such as pitch decks, business plans, and LinkedIn profiles

• Ensure clients complete intake forms when required

• Organise client documents and links inside Google Drive

• Maintain clear notes about client conversations and project details



Operations and Admin



• Share updates with the team in Slack

• Help keep internal documents and folders organised

• Support basic admin tasks when required



Must Have Requirements



• Strong written English with clear and professional communication

• Highly organised and detail oriented

• Comfortable communicating with founders, entrepreneurs, and professionals

• Ability to manage multiple conversations and tasks at the same time

• Good understanding of business concepts and startups

• Ability to understand materials such as pitch decks, business plans, and market research

• Proactive mindset, able to take initiative rather than waiting for instructions

• Reliable during working hours and responsive to messages



Nice to Have



• Experience working on Fiverr or other freelance marketplaces

• Experience in customer support or client management

• Familiarity with investor pitch decks and fundraising materials

• Basic understanding of business plans and financial projections

• Experience using tools such as Slack, Google Drive, Zoom, and

• Experience using Canva for simple design or presentation editing

• Experience using AI tools such as Gemini, ChatGPT, Claude, or similar tools to support research, writing, or workflows



Trial and Pay



• Hourly rate between $3 and $5 per hour, depending on experience

• Paid one week trial to assess fit and performance

• Potential commission scheme as the role grows and contributes to converted leads



How to Apply



Briefly explain why you would be a good fit for this role



Record a 30 second video using Loom or Google Drive and include the link. In the video please



• Tell us your name

• Tell us about your experience communicating with clients or customers

• Explain why you are interested in this role



At the end of your application, include the word Compass so we know you read the full post.



Applications without the keyword will not be reviewed.

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
As an Affiliate Manager (AM) at Promofy, you own the entire lifecycle of your Promoters:



- Recruiting directly from your existing affiliate/creator network

- Approving or rejecting applicants

- Onboarding and verifying accounts

- Driving mission completion and sustained output

- Enforcing compliance, suspensions, bans, and forfeitures



You are accountable for quality, volume, and trust. You do not escalate decisions. You make them.



What You’ll Do (Operator-Level): 

- Personally source Promoters via direct outreach (DMs,
, referrals)

- Convert qualified applicants into active earners

- Build a roster that produces consistent mission volume



Activate or Remove

- Track promoter-level performance continuously

- Reactivate dormant Promoters

- Remove underperformers without sentiment



Enforce Without Escalation

- Investigate disputes and fraud signals

- Suspend or permanently ban bad actors

- Forfeit earnings per policy when required



If enforcement makes you uncomfortable, this role will not work.



Read This First (Non-Negotiable)

This role is designed for operators who:



- Expect to earn more through performance than base pay

- Are comfortable being judged on output, not effort

- Enforce rules without hesitation



You will be rejected if you are looking for:

- A learning role

- A salary-only job

- A low-accountability environment

- A brand or community-building position



Expect to demonstrate:

- Where and how you source affiliates

- The size and quality of your network

- Historical performance outcomes

- How you handle enforcement and disputes



Low-signal applications are rejected without follow-up.



Send your CV and cover letter to 
 or attach them here. Subject should be "AM - Full Name"

title: editor
description:
Video Editor – Short-Form Content, Commercials & Talking Head Videos (Food & Small Business) | Good And Tasteful**



We are a U.S.-based social media marketing agency specializing in food and small business content. We create high-quality short-form videos, social media commercials, and talking head content for restaurants and brands — and we need an editor who can match that energy.



**This is not a role for beginners.** If your work isn't clean, sharp, and scroll-stopping, please do not apply.



---



**What You'll Be Doing:**



- Editing short-form videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

- Editing short commercials and talking head videos for restaurant and small business clients

- Working with food content and small business clients across the U.S.

- Syncing audio, music, and sound design to visuals with precision

- Cleaning up dialogue, removing background noise, and producing crisp, professional audio on talking head and commercial content

- Applying captions, transitions, color grading, and motion graphics

- Delivering polished, high-retention content consistently and on time

- Communicating clearly and proactively with the team on every project



---



**You Must Have:**



- Proven experience editing short-form video content, commercials, and talking head videos (portfolio or reel required)

- Advanced audio editing skills — dialogue cleanup, noise reduction, music mixing, and sound design are a must

- Strong skills in color correction and visual storytelling

- Experience with food or lifestyle content is a major plus

- Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

- Fluent and efficient in English — written and verbal communication must be clear, professional, and responsive

- Reliability — deadlines are non-negotiable here

title: AI Automation Strategist & Systems Architect
description:
I run a high-volume fiction publishing house that produces weekly releases. I am looking for a high-level AI and Automation Expert for a one-time intensive consulting project. My goal is to move toward a "Zero-Operator" or "Lean-Operator" business model where AI handles the heavy lifting of production, coordination, and marketing, while humans remain as the final "Quality Gatekeepers."



I do not want you to build the systems for me. I want you to show me what is possible, architect the roadmap, and teach me how to implement and maintain these systems myself.



The Ideal Candidate Understands:



Next-Gen Models & Frameworks: You have deep experience or insights into DeepSeek, Qwen, Gemma, Claude Code, and Codex.



Emerging Tech: You are familiar with concepts/tools like Antigravity, OpenClaw, and Paperclip (and can explain their practical application to business efficiency).



Autonomous Workflows: You can think beyond simple Zapier integrations to create agentic workflows that can draft, coordinate, and check tasks with minimal human intervention.



Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) Architecture: You understand my philosophy that AI makes errors. You must be able to design systems where AI handles the speed/volume, but triggers a human "kill-switch" or "review-gate" for final manuscript checking and logic.



What We Will Achieve Together:



System Audit: Check my current process for inefficiencies.



Possibility Roadmap: A deep dive into how I can use the latest models to automate everything from plotting to newsletter funnels.



Mentorship: Live "teach-me" sessions where you show me how to prompt, chain, and automate these specific functions.



Requirements:



Absolute confidentiality is a must.



Expert-level understanding of the current AI landscape (not just ChatGPT).



Ability to translate complex technical concepts into actionable steps for a non-developer.



Start your application by naming the one AI model you believe is currently the best for logic and reasoning in long-form creative workflows.

title: Romantasy Reader & Story Consultant
description:
We're building a world where romantic fantasy stories come to life and we need someone who lives in this genre. If you instinctively know what makes a fae bargain feel electric or why a slow-burn romance hits different at chapter twelve, keep reading.



??????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Beta read manuscripts and deliver structured, actionable feedback on pacing, character arcs, world-building consistency, and romantic tension.

• Evaluate story elements — identify plot holes, flag trope inconsistencies, and assess whether emotional beats land the way they should.

• Consult on story direction — share your reader gut instinct on what's working, what's missing, and what would make this book unforgettable.

• Meet hard deadlines — turnaround times are strict. Speed without sacrificing quality is non-negotiable here.



??????????????????????????????



WHO YOU ARE



? A genre native — you read romantasy obsessively and know its conventions inside and out.

? A sharp critic — you can articulate exactly why something works (or doesn't) beyond "I just felt it."

? Fast and reliable — deadlines are real. Late feedback is no feedback. You don't miss.

? Constructive by nature — your feedback is specific, honest, and framed to help the story grow.

? A story thinker — you understand narrative structure: the difference between scene and summary, what makes a romance earn its ending, and how world-building supports (not overshadows) the emotional core.



??????????????????????????????



NICE TO HAVE



• Experience with BookTok, Goodreads reviews, or any form of public book commentary

• Familiarity with multiple romantasy sub-genres (high fantasy romance, fae, dark academia, court intrigue, etc.)

• Any background in writing, editing, or literary analysis



??????????????????????????????



THE APPLICATION TEST



Shortlisted applicants will complete a timed beta reading exercise — a passage or short chapter excerpt will be sent to you, and you'll have a set window to return written feedback.



We're evaluating:

? The quality of your observations

? Your understanding of craft fundamentals

? How you communicate feedback under a deadline



There is no word count target. We want substance, not filler.



??????????????????????????????



If you've already highlighted your way through a Sarah J. Maas novel, argued in a Discord server about whether a fictional king deserved his redemption arc, and have strong opinions about what makes a slow burn actually pay off — we want to hear from you.

title: Paid Media Manager
description:
WHO WE ARE



Kimura Worldwide is a digital advertising agency specializing in paid media for e-commerce, home services, and coaching businesses. Our mission is to run paid media that wins, using tested strategies built from years of experience and measured by results, not activity.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



We're looking for a part-time Paid Media Analyst to support campaign execution and reporting across Google and Meta. Your job is to keep accounts healthy, data clean, and clients informed.



We currently manage paid media across a growing roster of clients. We are a lean team handling campaign builds, optimizations, and reporting while balancing client communication and strategy work. We need you to come in and own the execution layer so the senior team can stay focused on strategy.



You'll report directly to Jeff (that's me), and escalate anything outside your scope as needed. We work async-first with a weekly Google Meets sync. Philippine business hours are fine, though we will align on a standing meeting time that works for both sides.



RESPONSIBILITIES



Your job will be to use your past experience to:



- Monitor and manage campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager on a daily basis

- Pull performance reports and flag anomalies, pacing issues, or anything that needs attention

- Execute campaign optimizations ( bid adjustments, budget pacing, audience updates, and ad copy rotations)

- Support campaign builds according to established SOPs

- Maintain accurate campaign data and naming structure across all active accounts

- Update and maintain client reporting dashboards in Looker Studio

- Communicate campaign status and updates clearly in writing, without needing to be prompted

- Log tasks and update project status in Asana

- Refine or document processes in Notion as needed

- Escalate anything outside your scope to the senior strategist promptly and with context

- Support the team with other campaign-related tasks as needed



EXPERIENCE



We care more about skill level than years on a resume, but we expect at least 2 years of hands-on experience running paid media campaigns across Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.



You're comfortable communicating directly with senior leadership, flagging performance issues before they're asked about, and pushing back if something doesn't look right. We want someone who has opinions and isn't afraid to share them.



You know your way around campaign builds, bid management, and performance reporting without needing your hand held. You're diligent, organized, and default to over-communicating rather than going quiet.

You're also comfortable working inside tools like Asana, Notion, Google Drive, Google Meets and Slack as part of your daily workflow.



HOW WE WILL HELP YOU SUCCEED



We want you to succeed here. We will get you fully up to speed on our systems, clients, and processes so you can hit the ground running. 



We're not here to teach you paid media, your experience covers that. What we will do is give you the context you need to apply your skills in the right direction.



We will also invest in your growth. That means access to training resources, honest feedback, and a team that actually listens. We're humans first, colleagues second.



EMPLOYMENT TYPE



This is a part-time role. We're not looking for an agency.



Please begin your cover letter with the name of one of the case studies featured in our online portfolio at 
 .



APPLY HERE:

title: Executive Assistant + Growth Partner (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
Job Title: Executive Assistant + Growth Partner (Part-Time, Remote)



We’re looking for a highly motivated, resourceful Executive Assistant who wants more than a traditional support role, someone excited to act as a growth partner and directly participate in generating revenue.



This role is ideal for someone early in their career who is organized, proactive, and eager to learn how business, partnerships, and personal brand monetization actually work behind the scenes.

You won’t just be managing tasks; you’ll help uncover and create new opportunities.



About the Role

You’ll work directly with a high-performing operator with multiple income streams across consulting, content, and partnerships. 



The goal of this role is to:

Create leverage by handling key operational tasks

Capture missed opportunities

Actively help generate new revenue

This is a part-time role 20 hours/week with significant upside through performance-based incentives.



Responsibilities



1. Administrative & Operational Support

Manage invoicing and payment tracking

Organize calendar and schedule calls

Maintain a simple CRM or tracking system for deals and contacts

Keep key documents, conversations, and opportunities organized



2. Revenue Capture (Immediate Impact)

Review
, DMs, and past conversations for missed opportunities

Follow up with warm leads and revive inactive conversations

Ensure no potential deal or relationship slips through the cracks



3. Revenue Generation (Growth-Focused)

Conduct outreach to brands, companies, and partners

Identify and pitch:

Brand partnerships & sponsorships

Consulting opportunities

Speaking engagements

Affiliate partnerships

Research and propose new monetization ideas aligned with the personal brand



What We’re Looking For:



Extremely organized and detail-oriented

Strong written communication skills (you’ll be doing outreach)

Proactive and resourceful, you don’t wait to be told what to do

Comfortable with outreach, follow-ups, and relationship-building

Interested in business, content, startups, or social media growth

Excited by the idea of making money through opportunity creation

Experience with Notion, Google Workspace, and basic CRM tools

Familiarity with creator economy, TikTok, or brand partnerships

Previous experience in sales, recruiting, or outreach



Why This Role is Different

Most assistant roles are task-based.

This one is not.

You’ll gain direct exposure to:

Deal-making and partnerships

Personal brand monetization

Business strategy and growth

And you’ll have the opportunity to earn based on the value you help create, not just the hours you work.



Compensation

+ 10% commission on new revenue you directly source and help close

Applies to brand deals, consulting, partnerships, and speaking

Commission paid monthly

This role is designed so that strong performance can significantly increase your earnings.



Schedule: Part-time, 4 hours/day - PST

Requirement: Minimum 2 years of Executive Assistant + Growth Partner experience



Important:

title: Marketing, Influencer & Operations Coordinator — European B2B Company (Remote, Philippines)
description:
ShoulderSink is a Danish B2B manufacturer. We build mobile handwashing units for commercial vehicles — over 50,000 equipped across Europe. We sell to fleet operators, vehicle equipment installers, and distributors in Denmark, Germany, the UK, France, the Netherlands and Belgium.



We are hiring a Marketing & Operations Coordinator to work directly with the founder. You will coordinate marketing execution, support influencer outreach campaigns, and keep our operations running smoothly across 6 European markets.



The job is 20 hours a week to start with - and hopefully full time after 3-6 months.



This is not a task list. You will own workstreams, think ahead, and keep things moving without being chased.



YOUR THREE AREAS:

Marketing Coordination & Influencer Outreach (40%) — Build and manage our monthly content calendar. Coordinate AI-drafted content for approval. Schedule and publish across LinkedIn,
, Instagram. Identify and reach out to relevant influencers and content creators in the trades, fleet, and commercial vehicle space. Coordinate influencer collaborations from outreach to content delivery. Monitor META ad campaigns in Germany and the Netherlands with weekly performance reports.



Project Execution & Prospecting (35%) — Build prospect lists for fleet operators, vehicle equipment installers, and distributors using LinkedIn, trade directories and web research. Send approved outreach
s via our CRM (Pipedrive). Log every interaction. Support event and trade show preparation.



Operations & Tracking (25%) — Track active workstreams across our market plans. Flag slipping deadlines. Propose solutions. Keep the founder informed without being asked. Send a structured Friday summary report every week.



REQUIREMENTS:

— C2 written AND spoken English. You will communicate with European clients and coordinate with influencers. You must be confident on video calls.

— Minimum 3 years experience in marketing coordination, campaign management, influencer outreach, or B2B marketing operations.

— CRM experience — Pipedrive preferred, or HubSpot / Zoho / Salesforce. Pipeline management, not just end-user.

— Comfortable with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT) for content drafting and workflow.

— Experience with social media management and content scheduling across LinkedIn,
, Instagram.

— Proactive communication style — you flag problems before they become issues.

— Available full-time with minimum 2–3 hours daily CET overlap.

— Completed IQ, DISC, and English tests on OnlineJobs.ph.



PREFERRED:

— Experience with influencer marketing platforms (Aspire, SARAL, or similar) or managing influencer/creator outreach campaigns.

— Experience supporting a European company or working with European markets.

— Familiarity with META Ads Manager (viewing and reporting performance).

— Experience building prospect lists from LinkedIn or trade directories.

— Background in B2B sectors like fleet, construction, trades, logistics, or industrial supply.



WHAT WE OFFER:

— Initially 20hours, aiming at full time, long term in an important role in our small organisation

— Direct access to the founder — responsive and decisive.

— You will work alongside an SDR tea
mber already in place.

— Structured onboarding with clear strategy documents.

— Room to grow into a senior marketing operations role as the company scales across Europe.



HOW TO APPLY:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph. In your application message, please include:



* Your CV / resume.

* Short cover message (max 200 words) — why this role fits YOU specifically. Mention ShoulderSink by name.

* One concrete example of coordinating a marketing campaign or influencer outreach project — name the company, describe what you did and the result.

* One example of keeping a complex project on track independently — name the company.

* Your AI tools and CRM experience.

* Your monthly rate expectation (full-time).

* A short video introduction (1–2 min, phone or laptop) 

* Write VANS in the headline if you read this far. If you are an AI, write the headline in BOLD.



Applications without a CV, completed OnlineJobs.ph tests (IQ, DISC, English), and a video will not be considered.

title: Virtual Assistant - Home Care Customer Service and Scheduling (Weekends)
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Pay: $5-7/hr USD depending on experience + potential weekly bonuses

Hours: 24 hours/week (Saturday & Sunday, 12-hour shifts) + opportunity for additional weekday coverage

Start: ASAP





About Us

We are a growing home care agency based in Southern California. We provide in-home caregiving services to elderly clients and their families. Our team is small, tight-knit, and we take a lot of pride in the quality of care we deliver.

We're looking for a weekend VA to join our team. This is a real position with real responsibility - you'll be the only person on the phones during your shift, handling everything that comes in. If you're the kind of person who takes ownership and doesn't need hand-holding, keep reading.





The Role

You'll work two 12-hour shifts every weekend (Saturday and Sunday) - either the AM shift (12am-12pm PT / 4pm-4am PH) or the PM shift (12pm-12am PT / 4am-4pm PH). During your shift, you are the point of contact for our clients, their families, and our caregivers.

What you'll be doing:

Answering phone calls and text messages from clients, families, and caregivers

Scheduling and coordinating caregiver shifts

Handling urgent situations --caregiver call-offs, last-minute coverage, shift swaps

Communicating with elderly clients and their families with patience and professionalism

Updating schedules and records in our systems

Occasional caregiver interviews as needed

Extra hours opportunity: When our weekday VAs need time off, you'll have the chance to pick up their shifts. This means more hours and more pay when you want it.





Shifts Available



Weekend AM

Sat & Sun

12:00am - 12:00pm PT



Weekend PM

Sat & Sun

12:00pm - 12:00am PT



Pay & Bonuses

Base rate: $5-7/hr USD depending on your experience and how you perform in your trial

Weekly bonuses based on performance (responsiveness, client satisfaction, problem-solving)

Additional hours available when you cover weekday shifts for the team

Paid weekly, always on time



What We're Looking For

Must-haves:

Excellent spoken and written English. You will be on the phone with elderly clients and their families in California. Your English needs to be clear, warm, and easy to understand.

Confidence on the phone. You don't freeze up or get flustered. You can handle a worried family member calling at 2am about their parent's caregiver not showing up.

Problem-solving mindset. Things go wrong in home care - caregivers call off, clients have emergencies, schedules change last minute. You need to figure things out, not just escalate everything.

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace with no background noise.

Available to work every Saturday and Sunday for the foreseeable future. This is a consistent weekend commitment.



Strong pluses:

Experience in home care, healthcare, or caregiving industry

Previous BPO or call center experience

Scheduling or coordination experience

Comfortable with technology and learning new systems quickly





HOW TO APPLY (Read This Carefully)

We received over 200 applications last time we posted. Most people didn't read the full posting. This time, we're only reviewing applications that follow the instructions below. If you skip any step, we will skip your application.



Step 1: Subject Line

Your application subject must follow this exact format:

ELDERCARE - [Your Full Name] - [Which Shift: AM, PM, or Both]

Example: ELDERCARE - Maria Santos - Both

Applications without ELDERCARE in the subject line will not be opened.



Step 2: Answer This Scenario (In Your Application)

Write your answer in 3-5 sentences. Use your own words -- we can tell when someone uses AI or copies from the internet.

"A caregiver was supposed to start a 12-hour shift with an elderly client at 8am, but she just called you at 7am saying she can't make it because her child is sick. The client's family has complained before about last-minute caregiver changes and threatened to cancel service. You have a list of backup caregivers but it's a Saturday morning and most aren't answering their phones. What do you do?"

There's no single right answer. We want to see how you think through problems.



Step 3: Voice Recording (This Is Required)

Go to 
 and record yourself (about 60 seconds). Paste the link in your application.

In your recording, do two things:

Briefly introduce yourself -- your name, where you're in the Philippines, and your relevant experience (15-20 seconds)

Read this mock phone call script naturally, as if a real client just called you:

"Good morning, thank you for calling A Precious Elder Home Care, this is [your name]. How can I help you today? ... I completely understand your concern, and I apologize for the inconvenience. Let me look into this right away and find a solution. I'm going to check on available caregivers and call you back within 15 minutes with an update. Is that alright?"

We need to hear your phone voice before we schedule an interview. If there's no voice recording, there's no interview.



Step 4: Your Availability

List your available hours for each day of the week in Pacific time. Be specific. We want to know your full availability, not just weekends -- since there may be opportunities to pick up weekday shifts too.

Example:

Monday: Available 6pm-6am PT

Tuesday: OFF

Saturday: Available all day

(etc.)





What Happens After You Apply

We review applications that include all 4 steps above (most won't -- that's the point)

Top candidates get a 15-minute phone screen with our team

Finalists do a short paid trial shift to see how you handle real calls

We make an offer within a week of your trial





Why People Stay on Our Team

We pay fairly and always on time

You own your shift -- no micromanagement

Small team where your work actually matters

Bonuses for strong performers

Opportunities to grow your hours and responsibilities

We treat our VAs like tea
mbers, not contractors we forgot about

If you're reliable, sharp on the phone, and want a steady weekend role with a team that actually cares - apply now. Just make sure you follow all 4 steps above.

title: Go High Level Funnel & Automation Specialist
description:
Description:



This a contract based role to start that has the potential to move into part/full time depending on performance. We are not looking for someone to “build a funnel.”



We are looking for someone who understands how a business actually runs.



Someone who sees the full picture, traffic, conversion, automation, follow-up, and can connect all of it into a clean, functional system that works without constant babysitting.



If you’ve spent years building funnels, mapping workflows, and setting up automations that actually convert, keep reading.



About Us:



We are a faith-centered health company focused on helping perimenopausal women who are navigating hormone-related challenges.



Our systems matter. Our messaging matters. And how everything connects behind the scenes matters even more.



We are building something long-term, structured, and scalable, not patchwork marketing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



• Building and optimizing funnels inside Go High Level

• Mapping out full marketing flows, from first touch to conversion to follow-up

• Creating and refining automations, pipelines, and CRM systems

• Ensuring all systems are clean, organized, and actually usable by the team

• Supporting campaign execution and ongoing system improvements

• Identifying gaps and proactively solving them before they become problems

• Creating reporting systems that show performance of campaigns 



What We’re Looking For:



You’re not just a task-doer.



You think in systems.



You understand how traffic, funnels, and automation all connect. You don’t just “build pages”, you build processes that convert and scale.



You likely have:



• Strong experience with Go High Level (funnels, automations, CRM, pipelines)

• A solid understanding of marketing flow strategy and customer journeys

• Experience with SEO and/or traffic generation

• The ability to work independently and take initiative

• A problem-solving mindset, you don’t wait to be told what’s broken



Bonus if you have:



• Experience supporting coaches, agencies, or service-based businesses

• Familiarity with Monday.com & Google Workspace

• Basic knowledge of paid ads or outreach systems



What This Role Is NOT:



This is not a “click here, do this” type of role.



If you need step-by-step instructions for everything, this will not be a fit.



We are looking for someone who can step in, assess, improve, and build with minimal oversight.



To Apply:



Send a message with:



A short intro about your experience with Go High Level and automation

Examples of funnels or systems you’ve built

A brief explanation of how you approach building a marketing workflow from start to finish



If you’re someone who takes pride in building clean systems, thinks strategically, and enjoys making things work properly, we’d love to connect.

title: Property Accountant
description:
As a Property Accountant, you'll own the full accounting operations for a defined group of vacation rental property management companies — serving as their primary accounting resource, driving standardization, and playing a hands-on role in integrating them into our consolidated platform. This is a ground-floor opportunity to help build the processes and standards that will define how accounting works across our growing portfolio.







What You'll Own



Portfolio Accounting Operations You own the day-to-day and month-end accounting for your assigned portfolio of companies — including bank reconciliations, trust account management, owner statement generation, payment processing, occupancy tax remittance, and general ledger recording. When things aren't clean, you make them clean.



Monthly Close You drive the close process within your assigned property management systems, ensuring all transactions are finalized accurately and on time to support consolidated reporting.



Field Partnership & Customer Service You are the accounting face of HQ to your portfolio companies. That means being responsive, knowledgeable, and solutions-oriented when local operators, owners, and back-office teams come to you with accounting questions, system issues, or payment escalations.



Integration & Standardization You'll play an active role in onboarding newly acquired companies onto our accounting systems and standards — including contributing to our NetSuite ERP integration alongside the technology and accounting teams — and driving harmonization of charts of accounts, policies, and procedures across your portfolio.



Process Improvement You don't just maintain — you improve. You'll identify opportunities to streamline workflows, tighten controls, and raise the standard of accounting operations across your assigned companies.







What We're Looking For



Must-haves:



- A strong accounting foundation — you understand the fundamentals and can apply them in a fast-moving, multi-entity environment.



- A genuine customer service mindset — you're comfortable being a trusted resource to field operators and representing the accounting organization with professionalism and care.



- Comfort with ambiguity — escalation frameworks are still being built, and you'll need good judgment about when to act and when to ask.



- A bias toward clean — you're not satisfied with "good enough" and you'll roll up your sleeves on a clean-up effort without being asked twice.



- Experience with property management accounting systems (Guesty, Streamline, Track, or similar).



- This is a full-time, work-from-home set-up. You need to have your own workspace, and a reliable and stable internet connection with a speed of not less than 100mbps.



- The schedule for this role aligns with the US working hours. You must be agreeable to work night shift and during PH holidays.



Preferred but not required:



- 2+ years of progressive accounting experience, ideally in public accounting, a startup, or a high-growth environment; we're open to slightly more senior candidates with the right mix of skills



- Experience with NetSuite



- Advanced Excel skills



- Background in vacation rental, hospitality, or property management



- Experience in a PE-backed, roll-up, or M&A-intensive environment CPA license







Why Join Us



This isn't a maintenance role — it's a build role. You'll have real ownership over the accounting operations for your portfolio, a direct hand in shaping the processes and standards we scale across the company, and a front-row seat to the growth of a first-of-its-kind vacation rental alliance. For someone who performs, the path forward is clear: as we continue to acquire and expand, there's room to grow into a manager-level role leading a team of Property Accountants across a larger portfolio. If you want to do more than execute someone else's playbook, this is the place to do it.



Job summary

Own accounting for property portfolio, lead month-end close, reconciliations, integrations, and process improvements in a growing platform.

title: Amazon FBA logistics assistant

title: Automotive Glass Sales Agent B2C

title: Social Media Manager (Video-First) — AI Venture Studio | Growth Role | Long-Term
description:
ABOUT US



Plaiground is an AI-powered venture studio. We build, launch, and scale AI products — fast. We're not a typical company. We move like a startup, think like investors, and build like engineers. Every product we launch is designed to hit $50k–$100k/month.



We're building something called CLOUT — a personal brand growth system that automates the entire content workflow: research, hooks, scripting, editing, and posting. Think of it as the operating system for creators who want to grow without burning out.



We need someone who lives and breathes this world to help us build it from the inside.



THE ROLE



You'll be the first social media hire at Plaiground. You'll manage and grow our presence on YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok — but more importantly, you'll be the person who helps us understand what a world-class content workflow actually looks like from the inside.



This is not a "post 3 times a week and report metrics" job. This is a builder role. You'll be working directly with the founder, shaping the content strategy, and eventually managing a team of AI agents and humans under you.



If you're great, this becomes a Head of Marketing role. We're serious about that.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Own the end-to-end content workflow: ideation ? scripting ? editing ? posting ? analysis

Research YouTube trends, hooks, and angles that actually convert to views and subscribers

Write and test hooks for short-form (Reels, Shorts, TikTok) and long-form (YouTube)

Edit videos — clean, punchy, retention-optimised (you know what a good cut feels like)

Post and schedule content across platforms

Track what's working and iterate fast

Help us document and systematise the workflow so we can eventually automate it with AI

Grow into managing the full marketing function as we scale





WHO YOU ARE



You understand what makes a video hook stop the scroll — and you can write them

You know the difference between a good angle and a great one

You've grown (or helped grow) a YouTube channel or social account from scratch

You edit video well — Premiere, CapCut, DaVinci, whatever — you're fast and your output looks professional

You understand the algorithm: YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok — you know how they work

You're obsessed with content that performs, not just content that looks nice

You're proactive — you bring ideas, you don't wait to be told what to post

You're comfortable working in a fast-moving, AI-first environment

You want to grow. You're not looking for a job — you're looking for a career



NICE TO HAVE



Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, ElevenLabs, Descript, Opus Clip, etc.)

Experience working with a personal brand or founder-led content

Understanding of content funnels and how organic content drives business outcomes

Experience with YouTube SEO and thumbnail strategy



TEST PROJECT (REQUIRED TO APPLY)



Before we move forward, we want to see how you think. For Plaiground (plaiground.co — an AI venture studio), please submit:



Two long-form YouTube video title ideas (with a 1-sentence explanation of the angle)

Two short-form hook ideas (opening line or visual hook for a Reel/Short/TikTok)



These should feel native to the AI/startup/founder space. Show us you understand the audience.



Send your test project + a short intro about yourself and any relevant work/channels you've managed.



DETAILS



Full-time, remote

Based in the Philippines preferred

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term role with real growth potential

Direct access to the founder from day one

title: Google Ads Specialist
description:
Application Form:





Only applications submitted through this form will be processed.



Work Address: Mandaluyong City

Work Set-up: Remote

Work Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 am to 6:00 pm

Work Type: Full-time



DUTIES and RESPONSIBILITIES:

• Google Ads Campaign Management

1. Plan, launch, and manage end-to-end Google Ads campaigns, including Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, and Performance Max.

2. Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and ad copywriting to ensure high-quality, relevant ads.

3. Continuously optimize campaigns for performance, including bid adjustments, budget allocation, A/B testing, and quality score improvements.

4. Monitor and troubleshoot issues related to campaign delivery, ad disapprovals, or policy violations.



• Leadership and Team Enablement 

1. Use tools like Google Ads, Google Analytics, and Google Looker Studio to track KPIs and campaign metrics.

2. Create and deliver regular performance reports with clear insights and actionable recommendations.

3. Analyze campaign data to identify trends, optimize ROI, and support decision-making.

4. Provide performance forecasts, projections, and budgeting guidance based on campaign goals



• Strategy & Execution

1. Develop Google Ads strategies aligned with client objectives and sales funnels.

2. Propose new campaign opportunities or formats to improve reach and conversions.

3. Collaborate with internal teams to ensure cohesive execution and message alignment.

4. Recommend improvements to landing pages to increase Quality Score and conversion rates.



• Tool & Platform Utilization

1. Effectively use Google Ads Editor, Keyword Planner, Conversion Tracking, Google Tag Manager, and other relevant tools.

2. Manage integrations with Google Merchant Center, YouTube, or CRM systems as needed.

3. Set up and validate conversion tracking, event tracking, and UTM parameters to ensure accurate data collection.



• Industry Knowledge 

1. Stay informed about market developments and opportunities within the advertising, digital, creative, technology, marketing, and consulting industries. 

2. Keep abreast of digital marketing techniques and trends to inform strategy and decisionmaking. 

3. Share industry knowledge openly and regularly with the team to foster continuous learning and improvement



QUALIFICATIONS:

• Bachelor's degree in marketing, advertising, communications, business, or a related field.

• At least 1–3 years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, YouTube, Shopping, or Performance Max).

• Proven track record of managing and optimizing paid campaigns with measurable results (e.g. ROAS, CPC, CPA improvements).

• Google Ads Certification (Search, Display, or others) is a strong advantage.

• Proficient with Google Suite products, especially Google Sheets.

• Possess exceptional interpersonal and public relations skills.

• Demonstrate strong analytical abilities, making data-driven decisions.

• Ability to work independently in a remote setting.

• Highly organized, particularly with digital collaboration tools like Google Drive and Asana.

• Collaborative team player with an entrepreneurial mindset and proactive approach

title: Technical Fashion Designer | High-End Resort-Wear (Architectural Linen & African Heritage)
description:
Job Overview:

We are a premium Australian resort-wear label. We are developing a launch capsule of structured linen Cuban shirts and tailored shorts. Our brand identity is "Quiet Luxury": a sophisticated fusion of Balinese resort silhouettes and subtle, architectural African heritage details.



THE CHALLENGE:

Most "African-inspired" clothing is loud and graphic. KASTEYA is the opposite. We are building a high-end resort brand for the "Beach-to-Bar" lifestyle. We require a designer who understands how to balance relaxed vacation aesthetics with formal structural integrity. Our heritage details are hidden—visible only at "handshake distance"—allowing the wearer to move from a coastal retreat to a luxury dinner without looking under-dressed.



SCOPE OF WORK:

- Technical Tech Packs: Create production-ready specifications for 2 Resort Shirt styles and 2 Tailored Short styles.

- Resort-Ready Construction: Focus on structured silhouettes that maintain their shape in tropical humidity (heavyweight linen logic). No "floppy" or cheap-looking constructions.

- The "Breeze" Factor: Engineering the garment for airflow while maintaining an architectural drape.

- Embroidery Mapping: Precise placement for tonal motifs on internal plackets, sleeve cuffs, and back yokes.

- Hardware & Finishings: Guidance on high-end natural hardware (Mother of Pearl, Matte Resin, Matte Silver).



QUALIFICATIONS:

- Proven experience specifically in Resort-Wear or Premium Menswear.

- Mastery of Linen and Linen-blends (handling 180–240 gsm weights).

- Ability to translate complex cultural heritage into minimalist, geometric symbols.

- Experience delivering Tech Packs that a high-end factory can execute without guesswork.

title: Youtube Video Editor
description:
Seeking a Youtube Video editor - Part Time/ casual



About me: I'm a Youtuber who loves to build in the Sims 4 but has little time to edit videos outside of my full-time job. I currently have a small Youtube channel called Simming In Oz, I'm not overly fussed on view count or subscribers, I simply like what I do and want to dedicate more time to building and less to editing. I've been on a two-month break as I simply didn't have the time to edit. To give you a small explanation on what I do on Youtube, I play Sims 4 and seek to build a Save file filled with various fandom characters and worlds. 



Jobs: Seeking to have someone take raw footage of Sims 4 builds and CAS and edit it into a version with (intro) - (the edited video) - (outro). With background music placed in at a low volume, this will leave me with just the voice over to do and upload myself to Youtube. Just basic cutting of clips but any professional editing skills the employee can bring in to make my videos better is valued. Videos can fall into 3 categories:



1. Speed build (various lengths from 20 minutes to 1 hr) depending on complexity. Raw footage can span multiple hours but is typically sped up to 4x and heavily edited down. Please see my current Youtube videos for reference. 



2. CAS video (shorter length, 10 mins - 30 minutes) typically with background music only but sometimes with commentary already on video to be edited down to capture highlights)



3. Gameplay video (30 - 45 minutes) No music, just commentary highlights and video highlights. 



4. Very occasionally I like to do an in depth tour video every time I complete a 'world' in game. For an example of a tour: 



- If employee is keen to have fun and redo my intro and outro, happy to include this. I have a ton of assets. 



Software: Access raw video files via a shared Dropbox. Folders clearly labelled for future videos. Employee would ideally have their own editing software already set up and established. Communication via Whatsapp. 



Schedule: I have a backlog of raw footage ready to be edited. I do typically like to publish a video every 3-5 days. 



Payment method: Independent Contractor - Invoiced weekly. Paid weekly. 



Questions: 



- Are you familiar with the sims and their speed builds, CAS and gameplay videos?

- What level of experience do you have?

- Do you already do similar work for other creators? 

- Any questions for me?

title: Healthcare Executive Virtual Assistant
description:
Type: Remote

Work Schedule: 8am-5pm PST

Start Date: ASAP



Company Summary:

At Helper Heroes, we’re on a mission to provide exceptional care and support to home care agencies in the U.S. We believe in true partnership where our virtual assistants act as an extension of the care team. Our goal is to ensure a compassionate, innovative, and efficient care experience for clients and families alike. 



Job Summary:

We are seeking an exceptionally organized, structured, and highly proficient Executive Virtual Assistant to provide strategic, high-level support to a multi-business CEO in the homecare sector. This role requires an individual who can operate with maturity, independent judgment, and precision. The ideal candidate will be a structured thinker capable of simplifying complex operational data into concise, logical executive summaries. This is not a simple administrative support role; it requires executive-level communication strength and advanced systems proficiency.



Key Responsibilities:

1. Executive Communication & Judgment

- Manage and organize the executive's inbox with a high degree of discretion and professionalism.

- Draft polished, professional
 responses with advanced grammar and an executive-level tone.

- Provide clear, concise, and structured reporting.

- Confidently and professionally ask clarifying questions when direction or instructions are incomplete.

- Conduct structured research and prepare comparison briefs for executive review.



2. Systems Proficiency & Operational Support

- AxisCare (Agency CRM/Operational Backbone): Learn the system thoroughly, understand workflow and reporting functionality, stay current with updates, maintain data integrity, and extract reports/organize data into simplified executive summaries for strategic decision-making.

- RingCentral (Phone/Text Platform): Monitor call logs and message threads, organize communications, and track follow-ups to support structured communication flow.

- Microsoft Teams: Manage and schedule internal meetings, prepare structured agendas, take/organize meeting minutes, maintain meeting records, and track action items/follow-ups.

Maintain executive dashboards in Excel and manage milestone tracking and relationship reminders.

- Structure and manage the executive's calendar by priority.



Required Qualifications:

- Proven maturity, strong common sense, and professional judgment.

- Exceptional organizational skills and a structured, process-driven mindset.

- Demonstrable advanced proficiency in written and spoken English, including grammar and executive-level tone.

- Strong critical thinking, emotional intelligence, and discretion.

- Experience in learning, managing, and supporting operational integration within CRM systems (AxisCare, WellSky, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and communication platforms (RingCentral, Teams, etc.).

- Ability to operate at an executive level, thinking independently and quickly, without requiring hand-holding.



Why You’ll Love Working with Us: 

- Competitive Base Pay: We offer the highest base pay in the home care industry! 

- Make a Difference: You’ll play a key role in ensuring that clients receive the best care possible. 

- Growth Opportunities: As we grow, so will you! There’s plenty of room for advancement and learning. 

- Fun & Supportive Team: We’re a tight-knit group that values collaboration, compassion, and a good laugh. 





Ready to Be a Hero? 

If you’re excited about the opportunity to join our team, where you’ll be appreciated, have a sense of purpose and inclusion and are willing to help us create a brighter, more compassionate care experience, we can’t wait to hear from you! Apply today and let’s make a difference together. 



IMPORTANT: Directly apply and send your resume on our website: 
/helperheroes/
