title: Content & Influencer Manager
description:
About Us:

We’re a fast-scaling DTC supplement brand with a high-output creative operation. We move fast, we care deeply about creative quality, and we’re building a team of people who are genuinely obsessed with content — not just managing it.



The Role:

We’re looking for a full-time Content & Partnerships Manager to sit at the intersection of creator management, influencer partnerships, and organic content strategy. You’ll work hand-in-hand with our Creative Strategist to bring content ideas to life — from initial brief to final deliverable.



This isn’t a “schedule posts and write captions” role. This is for someone who lives and breathes content, knows what’s trending before it peaks, and gets real satisfaction from seeing a creative idea execute perfectly.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Briefing content creators — translating creative strategies into clear, actionable briefs covering B-roll shot lists, talking head scripts, testimonial formats, and original content concepts

- Managing creator relationships — owning the full workflow from outreach and onboarding to deliverable tracking and content labeling

- Managing influencer & brand partnerships — identifying, vetting, and managing ongoing partnerships that align with our brand

- Collaborating with our Creative Strategist — receiving creative direction and ensuring it gets executed accurately and on time by the right creators

- Staying ahead of trends — you should have a genuine pulse on what’s working on TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts right now



You’re the Right Fit If…

- You’re organically obsessed — you scroll TikTok and think “we should do that” before you think anything else

- You’ve managed UGC creators or influencers before and know how to get great output from them

- You can read a creative strategy and immediately understand what the content should look and feel like

- You’re organized enough to manage multiple creators and deadlines without things slipping

Bonus: you’ve grown or managed an organic social presence for a brand and can point to real results



Nice to Haves (Big Bonus):

- Experience with TikTok organic growth for a DTC or e-commerce brand

- You’ve run or been deeply involved in a UGC / creator program

- You think in content ideas naturally — you’re always noticing hooks, angles, and formats in the wild



What We’re NOT Looking For

- Someone who just schedules content and calls it management

- Someone who needs every idea handed to them

- Someone who isn’t genuinely excited by creative content



To Apply

Tell us in your proposal:

- A brand (DTC or otherwise) whose organic content you think is exceptional right now — and why

- A brief example of how you’d brief a creator on a B-roll concept for a health/wellness product

- Your experience managing influencers or UGC creators

$6/hour | Full-Time | Monday–Friday, 9AM–5PM UK Time



?? IMPORTANT: Applicants without Google Ads experience will be dismissed. Applications that fail to follow the "How to Apply" instructions will be dismissed



About Us

We're a small, close-knit team running a Google and Meta Ads agency on Fiverr. We help businesses grow through paid advertising and we're looking for a Customer Manager to be the key link between our team and our clients.

This isn't a "sit and wait for instructions" role. We need someone who takes ownership, thinks on their feet, and genuinely cares about delivering a great client experience. There's real room to grow here, both in responsibility and pay, as we continue to scale.



What You'll Be Doing

Client Communication



Be the main point of contact for customers from order start to delivery

Keep clients updated on their order progress and deliver completed work

Other admin tasks as needed to keep things running smoothly

title: Shopify Website Developer
description:
We are looking for a skilled Shopify Website Developer to build, customize, and maintain our eCommerce store. The ideal candidate has experience creating high-performing Shopify websites, improving user experience, and implementing custom features that drive sales.   





Key Responsibilities

Design, develop, and maintain Shopify stores

Customize Shopify themes to meet brand and business needs

Implement new features and functionality using Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Optimize website performance, speed, and SEO

Integrate third-party apps, APIs, and payment gateways

Troubleshoot bugs and technical issues

Ensure responsive design across mobile, tablet, and desktop

Collaborate with designers, marketers, and stakeholders





Requirements

Proven experience working with Shopify (portfolio required)

Strong knowledge of Shopify Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

Experience with Shopify theme customization and development

Understanding of eCommerce best practices and UX/UI

Familiarity with SEO principles and website optimization

Experience with version control (e.g., Git) is a plus

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail





Nice to Have

Experience with Shopify Plus

Knowledge of CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization)

Familiarity with tools like Klaviyo, Google Analytics, or Meta Pixel

Basic design skills (Figma, Adobe XD, etc.)

title: Finance Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and experienced Finance Specialist to oversee key financial operations and support strategic financial decision-making. This role will focus on bookkeeping, billing, payment processing, and chargeback management, and requires strong knowledge of U.S. financial systems and practices.



Key Responsibilities

Manage and oversee day-to-day bookkeeping, ensuring accurate and up-to-date records

Generate and send client invoices, and monitor payment collections

Handle and respond to credit card chargebacks, disputes, and fraud prevention

Reconcile accounts, manage expense tracking, and prepare monthly financial summaries

Collaborate with operations and client success teams to resolve billing inquiries

Support the month-end close process, including financial reporting and analysis

Assist in implementing and maintaining internal financial policies and controls

Prepare documentation for audits and tax filings, in coordination with external accountants



Requirements

3+ years of experience in a finance, accounting, or billing role

Proficiency with U.S.-based financial tools such as QuickBooks, Stripe, PayPal, etc.

Experience with credit card processing and chargeback prevention

Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

High attention to detail and accuracy in financial data

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal

Comfortable working in a remote and fast-paced environment

Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field (preferred)



Apply on

title: B2B Appointment Setter / Outbound SDR (LinkedIn + Cold Email) | SME and Accounting Firms
description:
I am the founder of Onwards Capita, a fractional CFO and finance execution firm helping SMEs improve cash visibility, working capital discipline, and short-term financial control.

I am hiring one disciplined outbound SDR / appointment setter based in the Philippines to help me generate qualified meetings.

This is not a strategy role.

This is not a closing role.

This is not a content-writing role.

I will provide:

• the target personas

• the outreach strategy

• the message scripts

• the one-pagers / sales material

• the qualification logic



Your role is to execute with discipline:

• identify the right targets

• run outbound on LinkedIn and cold

• follow up consistently

• manage replies and booking flow

• keep the CRM and tracking clean



Scope split

• 80% of your work: outreach to SME founders / decision-makers for a cash control / liquidity offer

• 20% of your work: outreach to accounting firm partners in Singapore and Malaysia for an early-stage pilot offer



What you will do

• Build and verify targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and other approved tools

• Identify decision-makers in our target markets and ICPs

• Run structured outbound sequences across:

o LinkedIn connection requests and follow-ups

o cold
 outreach and follow-ups

• Manage responses and keep communication professional, concise and accurate

• Handle basic replies using our pre-approved frameworks

• Escalate nuanced conversations to me

• Push qualified prospects to book a 10–15 minute intro call on my calendar

• Keep records clean in our CRM / tracker

• Report clearly on:

o prospects added

o touches sent

o positive replies

o meetings booked

o meetings held

o pipeline quality



Important

You will not use my personal LinkedIn account.

You will conduct LinkedIn outreach from your own professional profile and use a company
 address for cold
.



Ideal profile

You are a good fit if:

• You have real experience booking B2B meetings through LinkedIn and cold

• Your written English is strong and professional

• You are comfortable reaching out to founders, partners, recruiters, and senior decision-makers

• You know how to research and target properly instead of blasting low-quality lists

• You are organized, responsive, and reliable

• You understand CRM hygiene and follow-up discipline

• You do not need hand-holding every day

Strong advantage if you have

• Experience in B2B SaaS, financial services, consulting, accounting, or high-ticket services

• Experience prospecting Singapore, Malaysia, or US-based businesses

• Experience using LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, HubSpot, Zoho, or similar tools



Contract structure

• initial 4-week paid test engagement

• 20–25 hours/week

• If performance is strong, this will become a longer-term retainer

Compensation

• Base during 4-week trial: $400–$600/month equivalent, depending on experience, quality, and availability

• Hours: roughly 20–25 hours/week to start

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified meeting held

• Bonus: $200 for each SME client you sourced that signs and pays the first invoice

• Bonus: $30 for each qualified accounting firm partner meeting held

• Bonus: $300 when an accounting firm enters into a formal pilot contract discussion 



What success looks like

In the first 4 weeks, I expect:

• disciplined execution

• strong targeting quality

• clean tracking

• professional communication

• steady follow-up

• qualified meetings, not junk meetings



To apply

Start your application with the words: CASHCONTROL

Then include the following:

1. A short summary of your outbound experience

2. Which tools you have used: Sales Navigator, Apollo, Lemlist, Instantly, HubSpot, Zoho, etc.

3. Two examples of B2B outbound messages you personally sent that led to a booked meeting

4. Which geographies and seniority levels you have prospected before

5. Your availability over the next 4 weeks

6. Your expected monthly compensation for a 20–25 hour/week trial

Low-effort, generic applications will be ignored.

title: Media Buyer (Facebook/Meta, YouTube/Google Ads)
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking



Media Buyer (Direct Response | Performance-Focused)

Full-Time | Remote



About TRES



TRES is a Singapore-based performance marketing agency working with coaches, speakers, consultants, and education businesses across Asia. We specialise in direct-response campaigns — webinars, challenges, application funnels, and high-ticket offers — where real money is spent daily and performance matters.



We’re also part of a broader group that operates:

Play Bigger Mentoring (our education & mentoring brand)

Intellia (our proprietary GoHighLevel-based CRM & funnel platform)



All brands are owned and operated by the same team. This role sits fully within the TRES performance team.





Why This Role Is Different



This is not a branding or “boost post” role.



You’ll be working on:

- Real conversion campaigns

- Meaningful daily ad spend

- Funnels where decisions have real impact



You’ll follow proven SOPs — and you’ll also be trusted to make judgment calls when performance requires it.



If you want to grow fast by working close to real data, real money, and real decisions, this role will stretch you in the right way.





What You’ll Do



- Run and optimise conversion-focused paid ad campaigns (Meta primarily & YouTube next)

- Monitor campaign performance and flag issues early

- Own campaign health, not just execution

- Follow SOPs by default and make informed adjustments when needed

- Escalate performance issues and opportunities to the Ops Manager

- Participate in scheduled weekend monitoring for selected high-spend campaigns

- Join structured ad setup / implementation sessions for mentoring and Intellia launches (scheduled, SOP-led, execution-focused)



You’ll mainly receive all priorities and inputs from a single Ops Manager — no creative or stakeholder chaos.





What You Will NOT Be Responsible For

- Writing ad copy or designing creatives

- Redesigning funnels, offers, or pricing

- Handling client communication or account management

- Juggling multiple stakeholders or unclear priorities



Your focus is campaign performance and health, with clear boundaries and structure.





Who This Role Is For

This role is a good fit if you:

- Have hands-on experience running conversion ads (leads or sales)

- Are comfortable in performance-driven environments

- Stay calm, analytical, and accountable when things move fast

- Respect structure but don’t freeze when conditions change

- Communicate clearly and take ownership seriously



Who This Role Is NOT For

- “Set-and-forget” ad managers

- Freelancers juggling multiple clients

- People looking for a low-pressure, purely 9–5 role

- Anyone uncomfortable with responsibility tied to real spend





Compensation & Growth



At TRES, compensation is more than a monthly paycheck.



You’ll be operating in an ecosystem where:

- 6-figures are spent on paid ads monthly

- Multiple six figures are invested yearly into business, operations, education, health, and performance

- Decisions are made using real data, real risk, and real outcomes



What This Means for You

- Exposure to high-spend, direct-response campaigns

- Learn world-class media buying and direct response practices

- Grow beyond ads — into business thinking, systems, and personal performance

- Performance bonuses for strong execution and decision-making

- Opportunities to join yearly team retreats and overseas events held a few times a year



If you’re looking for comfort, this isn’t it.



If you’re looking to level up fast and grow properly, you’ll thrive here.



The questions are designed to understand how you think, not just what tools you’ve used.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.



Final Note

We’re not looking for button-pushers.

We’re looking for media buyers who:

Respect structure

Protect campaign performance

Take ownership seriously

If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.



How to Apply

Please complete the application form carefully.



Apply here:

title: Website/Landing Page/Funnel Graphic Designer
description:
We are Singapore’s fastest growing performance marketing agency seeking

Website/Graphic Designer

(1 full-time, remote position available)



We are Singapore’s fastest-growing performance marketing agency helping speakers, coaches, and service-based businesses build and scale million-dollar offers through paid ads and sales systems.



We are looking for a high-performance Website / Funnel Graphic Designer who understands conversion-driven design, mobile-first layouts, and AI-powered design workflows.



This is not a typical graphic design role.



You will be responsible for creating designs that directly impact revenue, including landing pages, ad creatives, webinar slides, and funnel assets.



You will work closely with our media buyers, copywriters, and funnel builders to produce high-converting marketing assets.



?



Who This Role Is For



You are someone who:

 • Designs clean, modern, conversion-focused layouts

 • Understands how design affects marketing performance

 • Is obsessed with spacing, alignment, and visual hierarchy

 • Thinks mobile-first

 • Uses AI tools to speed up and improve design workflows

 • Can execute quickly without sacrificing quality



If you only design pretty graphics but do not understand marketing, this role will not be a good fit.



?



What You Will Be Designing



You will create graphics and layouts for:



•?  ?Landing pages and funnels

•?  ?Static ad creatives for paid ads

•?  ?Webinar and training slides

•?  ?Membership site assets

•?  ?Marketing posters and event materials

•?  ?Funnel sections and conversion elements



Your designs must be clean, persuasive, and optimized for conversion.



?



Core Responsibilities



Design high-converting landing page layouts using strong visual hierarchy.



Create high-performing ad creatives for paid advertising campaigns.



Design webinar and training slides that improve speaker credibility and student engagement.



Collaborate with copywriters and media buyers to translate messaging into visual layouts.



Ensure all landing pages are modern, clean, and mobile responsive.



Support A/B testing of visual elements to improve performance.



Apply UX and conversion best practices in all marketing designs.



Organize and maintain structured design systems and reusable templates.



Document repeatable processes into internal design SOPs.



Stay updated with design trends, AI tools, and marketing creative strategies.



?



Required Skills (Must Have)



Modern Conversion Design



You must understand:

 • Visual hierarchy

 • Conversion-focused layouts

 • CTA placement

 • Color psychology

 • Typography systems



Mobile-Responsive Design (Mandatory)



All designs must be mobile optimized.



You must understand:

 • Mobile spacing

 • Readable font sizes

 • Button tap areas

 • Layout stacking

 • Mobile-first UX



If you do not design mobile-first, this role will not be suitable.



?



AI Design Tools (Mandatory)



You must have experience using AI tools to accelerate design workflows, including tools such as:

 • Lovable

 • Nano Banana

 • Gemini

 • AI design assistants or generators



We expect designers to use AI as leverage, not replacement.



?



Tools



You must be comfortable working with:



•?  ?Figma

•?  ?Canva

•?  ?GoHighLevel (GHL)

•?  ?Photoshop or similar design tools



?



Experience Required



You must have experience designing for:



•?  ?Landing pages

•?  ?Marketing funnels

•?  ?Paid ads

•?  ?Webinar slides

•?  ?Marketing campaigns



Experience in performance marketing or funnel design is highly preferred.



?



Personal Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



•?  ?Highly detail-oriented

•?  ?Able to execute fast under deadlines

•?  ?Comfortable working remotely and independently

•?  ?Able to handle multiple projects simultaneously

•?  ?Always learning new tools, especially AI tools



?



This Role Is NOT For You If



•?  ?You only design social media graphics

•?  ?You don’t understand marketing funnels

•?  ?You struggle with mobile design

•?  ?You cannot work independently

•?  ?You avoid learning new tools



?



Application Process



To be considered for this role, applicants will go through:



1?? Portfolio review

2?? Timed design assignments

3?? Final interview



Only candidates who demonstrate speed, accuracy, and attention to detail will proceed.



?



Why Join Us



You will work alongside a high-performance marketing team building scalable businesses for experts and entrepreneurs.



You will gain exposure to:



•?  ?High-level funnel strategy

•?  ?Conversion optimization

•?  ?Paid advertising creative strategy

•?  ?AI-powered marketing workflows



If you are keen to work with our driven, collaborative and value-creating team, please complete the form below for consideration, and you will be notified once your application has been processed.

title: Email CRM Strategist
description:

This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

What We Offer

Application

title: Junior Consultant
description:
We are based in Melbourne Australia. We are looking for a highly disciplined and hardworking Junior Consultant/Appointment Setter to join our growing education consultancy team. This is a high-volume outbound calling role. We are not looking for “talent”. We are looking for hardworking, consistency, discipline, and commitment.



Your Role

• Follow structured call scripts

• Qualify students according to their suitability

• Book qualified appointments for Senior Consultants

• Handle objections calmly and professionally

• Follow up consistently until contact is made



This is a performance-based role. Only committed individuals should apply.



We Are Looking For Someone Who:

• Speaks clear, neutral English (minimal accent)

• Has strong phone confidence

• Is mentally strong and not easily discouraged

• Is comfortable with repetitive work

• Is available 20-40 hours a week

• Wants long-term growth



What We Offer

• Stable long-term opportunity

• A minimum of 20 hours and maximum of 40 hours per week

• Salary reviews Every quarterly

• Growth opportunity into Consultant role (for top performers)

We never had payment delay issues. You will always be paid on time.



Application Process

Due to high application volume, we only review candidates who complete the following:

Record a self-introduction video in English.



In your video, please answer the following questions:



1. Tell us more about you as a person.

What kind of person are you? How would you describe your personality?

Share your work attitude and work style.

Tell us about your likes, dislikes, interests, and hobbies.

We want to understand what you are naturally like.



2. From a professional perspective, tell us:

How do you like to be managed or treated at work?

What kind of working environment helps you perform best?

What role do you usually take in a team?

In your opinion, what are the most important qualities of a strong Appointment Setter?

Why do you believe you are a good fit for this role?

Please also include your expectations, including:

anything else you would like us to know

your salary expectation

title: Supply Chain Manager / Procurement Manager - Amazon, eCommerce, Manufacturing
description:
We’re a fast-growing eCommerce brand with our own warehouse and factory in the Netherlands. We work with both raw materials and finished goods, which means inventory planning is core to keeping things flowing smoothly.



We’re now looking for an Supply Chain Manager, someone who’s on top of the numbers, always sees the stock gaps before they happen, and loves making sure the right products are on the shelves at the right time.



Our Mission

At Sybotanica, a small, high-growth startup, we wake up every day to make plants happy!

To do that, we need to act fast, take ownership, and take pride in our work as a team.



If we succeed, we’ll become Europe’s #1 houseplant brand, and we’ll know we’ve made it when we can proudly call 500,000 plant lovers our customers.



You will be working closely with the operations department, and the whole company is a team of 20 (10 PH based employees)

title: Part-Time Video Editor — Reels & YouTube (Two Brands)
description:
We are Fraser and Stefanie, an online business couple based in the Canary Islands. We run two distinct online businesses and we are building our content presence seriously in 2026. We are looking for a talented, reliable and creative part-time video editor to become a long-ter
mber of our small team.



This is not a one-off project. We want to find the right person and build a lasting working relationship with them.



---



**The Two Brands You Will Be Editing For**



**Brand 1 — Stefanie's Anxiety Coaching**

Stefanie is an energy healing coach and author of *Adios Anxiety*, a programme and book designed to help women overcome anxiety. Content for this brand includes Reels featuring Stefanie talking to camera, combined with stock footage, text overlays, and graphics. This brand has existing colours, fonts and logo that must be respected consistently. The tone is warm, empowering and professional.



**Brand 2 — Fraser & Stefanie Lifestyle / Enagic**

This is our joint lifestyle and education brand showing how we live and work online from the Canary Islands — our villa, travelling in our Mustang and motorhome, and the freedom that working online creates. Raw footage will include drone footage, Insta360 camera footage, and day-in-the-life style video. The tone is aspirational, motivational and authentic. This brand drives traffic toward our Enagic business opportunity.



---



**What You Will Be Editing Each Month**



- 10 Reels for Stefanie's anxiety coaching brand

- 10 Reels for the Fraser & Stefanie lifestyle/Enagic brand

- 4 YouTube videos (approximately 15 minutes finished length, raw footage 20–30 minutes)



**Total: approximately 24 pieces of content per month**



---



**What We Need From You**



- Captions and subtitles burned into every Reel as standard

- Royalty-free music selected by you to fit the mood of each piece (we have final approval)

- Clean, engaging cuts with text overlays and graphics where appropriate

- Ability to incorporate stock footage where needed alongside our raw footage

- Turnaround of 48–72 hours per piece where possible

- Footage will be delivered to you via Google Drive

- You must be able to handle two visually distinct brands and keep them separate and consistent



---



**You Are The Right Person If You:**



- Have solid experience editing Reels and YouTube content specifically

- Are confident with captions, motion graphics, text overlays and colour grading

- Can work with drone footage and Insta360 footage

- Have a strong eye for pacing, music selection and storytelling

- Are self-managing, reliable and communicate proactively

- Can work to deadlines without needing to be chased

- Have a portfolio or examples of previous Reels and YouTube edits you can share



---



**Software**

We are open to your preferred editing software — Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, CapCut or similar. Please tell us what you use.



---



**Hours & Compensation**

This is a part-time role of approximately 20 hours per week. Salary is **$600 per month**, paid monthly. This is a long-term position and we treat our tea
mbers well.



**To Apply**

Please send us the following:

- A short paragraph about yourself and why you are a great fit for this role

- Links to or examples of at least two Reels and one YouTube video you have edited

- The software you use

- Your availability and time zone



**Important:** Please include the word **"volcano"** somewhere in your application. Applications that do not include this word will not be considered. *(This is our way of knowing you have read the full job post carefully.)*

title: Mortgage Transaction & Client Communication Specialist
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant with mortgage industry experience to support the loan transaction process and client communications.



The primary focus of this role is to help ensure loans move smoothly once they enter underwriting, by coordinating communication between the borrower, lender processors, and third-party vendors such as title companies and homeowners insurance providers.



This person will serve as a communication hub during the transaction process, helping keep files organized, conditions addressed, and clients informed throughout the process.



We are looking for someone who is excellent with communication, highly organized, and experienced in mortgage operations.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Transaction Coordination

* Assist with managing loan files once they enter underwriting

* Communicate regularly with lender processors regarding loan status and conditions

* Monitor underwriting conditions and help ensure required documentation is collected

* Track key milestones to keep transactions moving efficiently toward closing



2. Client Communication:

* Follow up with borrowers throughout the loan process

* Provide updates on loan progress and underwriting status

* Help guide borrowers through documentation requests

* Maintain a smooth, professional experience for clients during the mortgage process



3. Vendor Coordination:

* Communicate with third-party vendors including:

- Title companies

- Homeowners insurance providers

- Other closing-related vendors

* Ensure all documentation needed for closing is received and submitted on time



4. File & Process Management

* Maintain organized digital loan files

* Track outstanding conditions and documentation

* Update notes and status updates in loan systems or internal platforms



5. CRM & Light Marketing Support (Nice to Have)

* Maintain basic updates in the company CRM

* Assist with organizing contacts and borrower communication notes

* Support simple automation workflows if applicable

* Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) is a plus but not required



Required Qualifications:

* 2+ years experience working in a mortgage company

* Strong understanding of the mortgage loan process from application through closing

* Experience communicating with borrowers, processors, and vendors

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Strong organizational skills and attention to detail

* Ability to manage multiple loan files simultaneously



Preferred (Nice to Have):

* Experience with loan origination systems (LOS) such as Encompass, Calyx, or similar

* Previous experience as a loan processor, loan officer assistant, or transaction coordinator

* Familiarity with CRM platforms

* Experience with GoHighLevel (GHL) or similar marketing CRM tools



Ideal Candidate Traits:

* Professional and confident communicator

* Highly organized and detail-oriented

* Proactive and solution-oriented

* Comfortable managing multiple moving pieces

* Client-focused with strong follow-up habits

30,000–40,000 pesos/month (based on hours & performance/experience)



For Personal Brands:



We are looking for a high-taste, detail-oriented female creative to manage content for 3 feminine luxury style personal brands (Niches: Feminine Finance, Feminine Energy, Lifestyle & Golf).



Responsibilities (Weekly)

- 2 Text Reels + 2 Quote/Carousel Posts

Requirements:



- Eye for soft feminine luxury

- Flexible and adaptable to client brands

- Adobe Premiere Pro or CapCut, Canva

- Ability to spot viral clips in long form videos

- Fluent in English, strong captions/video texts



Salary & Growth:

- 30,000 pesos for 30 hrs/week (starting); 40,000 pesos for 40 hrs/week (upon SMM agency growth)

- Performance-based raises & path to Project Manager
